About & FAQ

TQ SDE Complements

Comparing Singularity_Previous (Build: 3336176) to Singularity_Next (Build: 3356322)

Want to be notified of new patches? Hop into #hoboleaks on Tweetfleet Slack! Instructions on how to join Tweetfleet Slack here.
Please note that Singularity will be kept inaccessible except for specific testing windows, and may fall significantly behind Tranquility in patches. The Tranquility/Singularity diff (homepage) may not be particularly useful for the time being. Refer to the latest Tranquility patches instead.

Find Hoboleaks useful and want to provide some support at no additional cost to yourself?
Use affiliate code HL (short for HoboLeaks) the next time you make a purchase through the official EVE store, which has Omega, PLEX, and much more. The small commission we receive helps Hoboleaks remain ad-free. Thank you! ♥

No errors - you shouldn't see this text.

92565 - Raspite X-Grade This variant of Raspite ore is especially prized by Amarr engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Empire needed them.

Unlike regular Raspite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92569>Crystalline Raspite</a>, which is valuable to the Amarr Empire.		 Raspite

Capacity: 0.0

92566 - Polycrase X-Grade This variant of Polycrase ore is especially prized by Caldari engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the State needed them.

Unlike regular Polycrase ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92570>Crystalline Polycrase</a>, which is valuable to the Caldari State.		 Polycrase

92567 - Moissanite X-Grade This variant of Moissanite ore is especially prized by Gallente engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Federation needed them.

Unlike regular Moissanite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92571>Crystalline Moissanite</a>, which is valuable to the Gallente Federation.		 Moissanite

92568 - Kangite X-Grade This variant of Kangite ore is especially prized by Minmatar engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Republic needed them.

Unlike regular Kangite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92572>Crystalline Kangite</a>, which is valuable to the Minmatar Republic. 92779 - Crucifier Navy Issue War Reserves Lieutenant SKIN Imperial War Reserves mining operations are usually organized around combined naval and logistical units typically commanded by a Cardinal Lieutenant.

The Imperial War Reserves were established as a joint effort to build up and maintain a vast reserve of strategically vital materials by the Amarr Ministry of Assessment and the Ministry of War. The corporation is charged with surveying the Amarr Empire for resources and organizing their exploitation by mining operations.		 Permanent SKIN

92783 - Armageddon Navy Issue War Reserves Lieutenant SKIN Imperial War Reserves mining operations are usually organized around combined naval and logistical units typically commanded by a Cardinal Lieutenant.

The Imperial War Reserves were established as a joint effort to build up and maintain a vast reserve of strategically vital materials by the Amarr Ministry of Assessment and the Ministry of War. The corporation is charged with surveying the Amarr Empire for resources and organizing their exploitation by mining operations.		 Permanent SKIN

92785 - Griffin Navy Issue Military Stockpile Captain SKIN State Military Stockpile resource harvesting operations are considered a high priority and often commanded by a Captain of Engineers.

The State Military Stockpile was created by order of the Caldari State's Chief Executive Panel to seek out and develop militarily important resources within Caldari space. The Caldari Navy and the security forces of the "Big Eight" megacorporations are all able to draw from the deep reserves that are being built up by State Military Stockpile mining operations.		 Permanent SKIN

92791 - Maulus Navy Issue Strategic Materiel Defender SKIN Federal Strategic Materiel exploration and mining operations are usually commanded by a Defender Lieutenant specializing in engineering or logistics.

The Federal Strategic Materiel corporation was founded by executive order of President Jacus Roden and is tasked with finding and extracting resources vital to the Federal armed forces throughout Gallente space. The mining operations sent out to harvest resources from sites discovered by the Federal Strategic Materiel corporation have become a common sight in the Federation.		 Permanent SKIN

92797 - Vigil Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN Republic Fleet Ordnance mining and shipping operations are overseen by a technical specialist officer, usually of Spike Lieutenant rank.

Republic Fleet Ordnance is responsible for the acquisition of materials crucial to the construction and maintenance of all kinds of equipment used by the fighting forces of the Minmatar Republic. The resource scouts of Republic Fleet Ordnance scour Minmatar space for pockets of useful asteroids and can call upon mining operations to extract any valuable materials they discover.		 Permanent SKIN

92818 - Compressed Raspite X-Grade This variant of Raspite ore is especially prized by Amarr engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Empire needed them.

Unlike regular Raspite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92569>Crystalline Raspite</a>, which is valuable to the Amarr Empire.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 Raspite
Click to toggle showing the 25 attributes. descriptionID: 1038239

92819 - Compressed Polycrase X-Grade This variant of Polycrase ore is especially prized by Caldari engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the State needed them.

Unlike regular Polycrase ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92570>Crystalline Polycrase</a>, which is valuable to the Caldari State.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 Polycrase

92820 - Compressed Moissanite X-Grade This variant of Moissanite ore is especially prized by Gallente engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Federation needed them.

Unlike regular Moissanite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92571>Crystalline Moissanite</a>, which is valuable to the Gallente Federation.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 Moissanite

92821 - Compressed Kangite X-Grade This variant of Kangite ore is especially prized by Minmatar engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Republic needed them.

Unlike regular Kangite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92572>Crystalline Kangite</a>, which is valuable to the Minmatar Republic.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 Kangite

92822 - Salvation As the dust settled following the Warpath conflict of YC128, many smaller holdings on the fringes of the Amarr Empire fell into chaos. The constant onslaughts of Minmatar Republic strike teams had left these communities exposed to pirate attacks and vulnerable to internal revolt. Local holders sought a means to reimpose control while relying on their own fleets, which unlike the Imperial Navy, were largely made up of small and medium-sized ships.

They needed a way to improve the operational efficiency of these fleets while also demonstrating the awesome power of the Empire that backs them. Carthum Conglomerate’s solution to this problem was the Salvation. An advanced support carrier with robust command burst functions, it was capable of elevating a group of lesser vessels into an unstoppable armada.		 Command Carrier

92823 - Simurgh Following their betrayal by the Intaki Syndicate in YC128, the Caldari State annexed the entire region of Syndicate. This annexation did not end lawlessness within the region. The CEP declared that for far too long, criminal organizations had abused the semi-legal status of Syndicate for their own means. They charged the Caldari Navy with bringing the rule of law to the region.

To support these efforts, Kaalakiota developed the Simurgh. Its operational superiority was a threat that the criminal forces of Syndicate could not match. A mobile command centre with advanced combat capabilities, its mission was to bring honor to the lawless reaches of space.		 Command Carrier

92824 - Gaia Predicting that superior fleet support was going to be key to future engagements as the Warpath conflict of YC128 began, President Alix Moreau reached out to Duvolle Labs to commission work on a more advanced carrier design.

The team at Duvolle Labs was given unprecedented access to fleet telemetry research data to inform their design choices. They were charged with producing a ship that demonstrated the life-saving impact that advanced operational intel could have on a fleet, a flagship for Moreau’s vision of a more innovative Gallente future.		 Command Carrier

92825 - Ymir Following the escalating conflict of YC128, the Sebiestor Chief Acassa Midular called upon Core Complexion to create an elevated war platform capable of supporting the rapid response fleets she felt would be essential to Minmatar's success in the next war to come.

Core Complexion took the Nidhoggur's classic design and elevated it with the latest advancements in fleet support technology. Superior command support technologies allow it to unlock greater speed and resilience for its accompanying fleet members. It is the ultimate expression of the Republic's military doctrine, supercharged by the technical brilliance that Core Complexion and the Sebiestor have become synonymous with.		 Command Carrier

92857 - Moderate Navy Military Beacon This beacon marks a moderate military location. The entry gate is configured to admit Tech I and empire faction navy ships of Battlecruiser size or smaller.

The security features installed in this acceleration gate will prevent activation by any ship that is fitted with warp core stabilizer modules.		 Beacon

92971 - Anodized Freedom Metallic - Limited A license for the single use of a metallic nanocoating in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

93105 - Small Elite Military Beacon This beacon marks a small elite military location. The entry gate is configured to admit all ships of destroyer or smaller size of any tech level.

The security features installed in this acceleration gate will prevent activation by any ship that is fitted with warp core stabilizer modules.		 Beacon
Click to toggle showing the 13 attributes. descriptionID: 1039272

Untargetable: 1.0
93143 - Prototype 'Pluto' Mining Drone A prototype drone developed by CreoDron based on ORE's 'Excavator' mining drone design by incorporating experimental rogue drone technology. The harvesting protocols have been altered to behave much more like a Rogue Drone would when salvaging and recycling materials to be brought back to a rogue drone hive. The result is a far more efficient mining process creating less residue, albeit a slower one resulting in lower mining yields over time.

Currently this drone is unsuitable for mass production due to a high rejection rate with the rogue drone technology. CreoDron is hoping to improve their understanding of this process from knowledge gained from the Gallente Federation Military Campaign operation 'Rogue Edge'.		 Mining Drone

93145 - Prototype 'Pluto' Ice Harvesting Drone A prototype drone developed by CreoDron based on ORE's 'Excavator' mining drone design by incorporating experimental rogue drone technology. The harvesting protocols have been altered to behave much more like a Rogue Drone would when salvaging and recycling materials to be brought back to a rogue drone hive. The result is a far more efficient mining process creating less residue, albeit a slower one resulting in lower mining yields over time.

Currently this drone is unsuitable for mass production due to a high rejection rate with the rogue drone technology. CreoDron is hoping to improve their understanding of this process from knowledge gained from the Gallente Federation Military Campaign operation 'Rogue Edge'.		 Mining Drone

93466 - Imperial Benediction - Unlimited A license for the unlimited use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide <a href=showinfo:81348>Alignment Sequencer</a> to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing. Ship SKIN Design Element

93609 - Imperial War Reserves Supply Package A supply package that was procured and manufactured by the Imperial War Reserves corporation. Intended to deliver crucial military supplies to the Amarr Empire on the frontlines.

The Minmatar Republic will reward capsuleers who intercept these supply packages and bring them to Tribal Liberation Force stations in their loyalty point store.		 Miscellaneous

93610 - State Military Stockpile Supply Package A supply package that was procured and manufactured by the State Military Stockpile corporation. Intended to deliver crucial military supplies to the Caldari State on the frontlines.

The Gallente Federation will reward capsuleers who intercept these supply packages and bring them to Federal Defense Union stations in their loyalty point store.		 Miscellaneous

93650 - Acceleration Gate Acceleration gate technology reaches far back to the expansion era of the empires that survived the great EVE gate collapse. While their individual setup might differ in terms of ship size they can transport and whether they require a certain passkey or code to be used, all share the same fundamental function of hurling space vessels to a destination beacon within solar system boundaries. ( copy ) Warp Gate

93960 - Minmatar Occupied Stargate The old smuggling route gates were built by a coalition of Minmatar rebels and various pirate factions as a means to travel quickly and discreetly between the outer regions of space. They are favored by many to whom Empire Space is too high-profile and wish to keep a good distance from the vigilant fleet commanders of CONCORD. Large Collidable Structure

93963 - 'Aergia' Hobgoblin SW-300 Light Webifier Drone

Because of the instability inherent in affixing large, ship-capable webifier equipment to a small, mobile, independently powered carrier such as a mobile drone, the manufacturer had to sacrifice certain aspects of the drone's infrastructure. As a result, the drone has a high signature radius, making it relatively easy to target and hit, and isn't sturdy enough to suffer more than a few blows to its carapace.		 Stasis Webifying Drone

93998 - Federation Navy 'Argyreos' Magnetic Field Stabilizer The Federation Navy 'Argyreos' Magnetic Field Stabilizer is a special modification of the standard Magnetic Field Stabilizer to include command, control and communications firmware that will enhance drones alongside hybrid turrets.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.		 Magnetic Field Stabilizer

94029 - Caldari Occupied Stargate The old smuggling route gates were built by a coalition of Minmatar rebels and various pirate factions as a means to travel quickly and discreetly between the outer regions of space. They are favored by many to whom Empire Space is too high-profile and wish to keep a good distance from the vigilant fleet commanders of CONCORD. Large Collidable Structure

94058 - Imperial Navy 'Neophyte' Heat Sink The Imperial Navy 'Neophyte' Heat Sink is a special modification of the standard Heat Sink to include command, control and communications firmware that will enhance drones alongside energy turrets.

94065 - Republic Fleet Mining Survey Chipset An upgraded chipset for a mining vessel's integrated Mining Surveyor that grants superior asteroid information, and increases the chance of optimal mining outcomes.

Increases mining laser and ice harvester critical success chance and critical success bonus yield.
Decreases mining laser, ice harvester, and gas cloud harvester residue probability.
Enhances the integrated Mining Surveyor present in mining vessels by adding information about the quantity of ore remaining in scanned asteroids.		 Mining Survey Chipset

94067 - Caldari Navy Signal Distortion Amplifier Magnifies the operational ability of regular ECM target jammers, making them stronger and giving them greater reach. Works only with regular ECMs, not ECM Bursts.

94087 - Zero - Unlimited A license for the unlimited use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide Alignment Sequencer to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.		 Ship SKIN Design Element

portionSize: 1
94088 - Zero - Limited A license for the single use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has been bound, and though it can only be used once no sequence binders are required when it is consumed in the sequencing of a SKIN license.		 Ship SKIN Design Element

94152 - Abaddon Mandate of Faith SKIN As the Warpath Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire. Permanent SKIN
Click to toggle showing the 25 attributes. descriptionID: 1044088
typeID: 94152
Capacity: 0.0
raceID: 4

basePrice: 0.0

published: 1

94154 - Confessor Mandate of Faith SKIN As the Warpath Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire. Permanent SKIN

94155 - Cerberus State Regulator SKIN The State Regulators are made up of the best pilots from all eight megacorporations' security forces. Assembled during the Warpath conflict by the CEP, their task is to defend megacorp assets from Gallente assault and safeguard the infrastructure that holds the State together. These Regulators are the ultimate combination of State loyalty and corporate honor. Permanent SKIN

94157 - Bifrost Stark Strategist SKIN The smallest of the tribes by far, the Starkmanir are masters of ancient warfare strategies and battle wisdom all but lost by the other tribes. These strategies provide the basis for a Starkmanir Strategic wing, a small force of extremely effective Starkmanir pilots that came together in response to the Warpath Conflict. Famed for their ability to establish tactical superiority even against much larger enemy fleets, the Warpath Stark are often underestimated but never outclassed. Permanent SKIN

94160 - Magus Presidential Agent SKIN Formed by Presidential decree during the first days of the Warpath Conflict, the Special Presidential Agents are a unique military unit of independently operating special agents given total autonomy over their actions. They answer directly to the president, and their primary mission directive is to disrupt the Caldari operations by any means necessary. Permanent SKIN

95173 - Suspect Scout Navy Military Beacon This beacon marks a scout military location. The entry gate is configured to admit Tech I and empire faction navy ships of Frigate size.

The security features installed in this acceleration gate will prevent activation by any ship that is fitted with warp core stabilizer modules. Additionally, it will provide all capsuleers with a suspect timer when they activate the acceleration gate.		 Beacon

95192 - Pioneer <font size="14">Pioneer Expert System</font>

This Expert System makes available skills enabling the Capsuleer to fly a Mining Destroyer, such as a Pioneer.

The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for 7 days.

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14">Activating an Expert System</font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.		 Standard Expert Systems

61103 A filthy rich corporation that disassociated itself from the Federation when it tried to encroach on the companies riches. ORE operates mainly in the Outer Ring and Cloud Ring regions, where they have mining installations scattered around in hidden locations, grinding out the most valuable minerals on the market. 258304 If you launch {[item]typeID.nameWithArticle}, you may not be able to scoop it up again because of its size.

Before launching it ensure that you can anchor and build it in this location. You need to be within {[numeric]distance.distance, decimalPlaces=1} of an outpost your corporation owns and you need to have the equipment config role in your corporation.		 If you launch {[item]typeID.nameWithArticle}, you may not be able to scoop it up again because of its size.

Before launching it ensure that you can anchor and build it in this location. You need to be within {[numeric]distance.distance, decimalPlaces=1} of an outpost your corporation owns and you need to have the config equipment config role in your corporation.		 UI/Messages/2241/LaunchUpgradePlatformWarningBody

259246 You cannot do that on behalf of the {corp} corporation because they have not given you the equipment config role. You cannot do that on behalf of the {corp} corporation because they have not given you the config equipment role. You cannot do that on behalf of the {corp} corporation because they have not given you the config equipment config role. UI/Messages/1413/PermissionDeniedNeedEquipRoleBody
259354 If you launch a construction platform, you may not be able to scoop it up again because of its size.

Before launching it ensure that you can anchor and build it in this location. You need to be at the warp in point of a planet, in a corporation that is in an alliance that holds sovereignty over the solar system, there needs to be no pre-existing outpost already built in the system, no pre-existing construction platforms already building and you need to have the equipment config role in your corporation.		 If you launch a construction platform, you may not be able to scoop it up again because of its size.

Before launching it ensure that you can anchor and build it in this location. You need to be at the warp in point of a planet, in a corporation that is in an alliance that holds sovereignty over the solar system, there needs to be no pre-existing outpost already built in the system, no pre-existing construction platforms already building and you need to have the config equipment role in your corporation.		 If you launch a construction platform, you may not be able to scoop it up again because of its size.

Before launching it ensure that you can anchor and build it in this location. You need to be at the warp in point of a planet, in a corporation that is in an alliance that holds sovereignty over the solar system, there needs to be no pre-existing outpost already built in the system, no pre-existing construction platforms already building and you need to have the config equipment config role in your corporation.		 UI/Messages/1064/LaunchCPWarningBody
260029 You cannot perform that action on that object as you do not have the required role in your corporation, Equipment Config. You cannot perform that action on that object as you do not have the required role in your corporation, Config Equipment. You cannot perform that action on that object as you do not have the required role in your corporation, Config Equipment Config. UI/Messages/365/CantConfigureCorpRoleLackingBody
283111 In the wake of the infamous Elarel massacre, the Quafe megacorporation dismissed almost all of the upper echelon of its security division. These men and women promptly formed their own private security company and, forced into taking jobs most would not by the taint of their failure at Elarel, rapidly gained a reputation for absolute ruthlessness and total dedication to getting results for those giving them contracts.

In YC124, EverMore purchased the company, and the company was contracted to take on security responsibilities for all of EverMore's subsidiaries. Why a company primarily known for its distribution network would require an infamous group of military specialists for internal security tasks remains unclear.		 In the wake of the infamous Elarel massacre, the Quafe megacorporation dismissed almost all of the upper echelon of its security division. These men and women promptly formed their own private security company and, forced into taking jobs most would not by the taint of their failure at Elarel, rapidly gained a reputation for absolute ruthlessness and total dedication to getting results for those giving them contracts.

In YC124, EverMore purchased the company, and the company was contracted to take on security responsibilities for all of EverMore's subsidiaries. Why a company primarily known for its distribution network would require an infamous group of military specialists for internal security tasks remains unclear.

In YC128, their role was extended to include acting as Jita’s new security force after Alexander Ducasse, President of EverMore, negotiated the new terms of Jita’s administration by CONCORD. While CONCORD agents would conduct their normal high-security response duties within the system, local business concerns were uneasy about giving them authority over Jita’s day-to-day security. Ducasse offered Villore Sec Ops as a business-friendly alternative.		 In the wake of the infamous Elarel massacre, the Quafe megacorporation dismissed almost all of the upper echelon of its security division. These men and women promptly formed their own private security company and, forced into taking jobs most would not by the taint of their failure at Elarel, rapidly gained a reputation for absolute ruthlessness and total dedication to getting results for those giving them contracts.

In YC124, EverMore purchased the company, and the company was contracted to take on security responsibilities for all of EverMore's subsidiaries. Why a company primarily known for its distribution network would require an infamous group of military specialists for internal security tasks remains unclear.

In YC128, their role was extended to include acting as Jita’s new security force after Alexander Ducasse, President of EverMore, negotiated the new terms of Jita’s administration by CONCORD. While CONCORD agents would conduct their normal high-security response duties within the system, local business concerns were uneasy about giving them authority over Jita’s day-to-day security. Ducasse offered Villore Sec Ops as a business-friendly alternative.		 Description of Corporation "Villore Sec Ops" (1000217)

283474 Enable safety to prevent all actions that would give you suspect, criminal, or retribution status. Prevents all actions that would give you suspect, criminal, or retribution status. 283475 Partial safety prevents actions that give criminal status, while allowing those that give suspect or retribution status.

Suspect status allows other capsuleers to attack you for a limited period. Retribution status applies in Zarzakh.		 Prevents actions that give criminal status, while allowing those that give suspect or retribution</> status.

Suspect status allows other capsuleers to attack you for a limited period. Retribution status applies in Zarzakh.		 Partial safety prevents actions that give <b>criminal</b> status, while allowing those that give </b>suspect</b> or <b>retribution</> status.

283476 Disable safety to allow actions which give suspect, criminal, or retribution status.

Criminal status allows other capsuleers to attack you, and will cause CONCORD to attack you in high-security systems, for a limited period. Retribution status applies in Zarzakh.		 Allows actions which give suspect, criminal, or retribution status.

Criminal status allows other capsuleers to attack you, and will cause CONCORD to attack you in high-security systems, for a limited period. Retribution status applies in Zarzakh.		 Disable safety to aAllows actions which give <b>suspect, </b>, <b>criminal</b>, or <b>retribution</b> status.

501481 bonus to Warp Scrambler range bonus to Warp Scrambler range bonus to <a href=showinfo:3436447>Warp Scrambler</a> range Trait for item "Sin" (22430)
501688 bonus to Heavy Missile and Heavy Assault Missile Launcher rate of fire bonus to Heavy Missile and Heavy Assault Missile damage bonus to <a href=showinfo:3324>Heavy Missile</a> and <a href=showinfo:25719>Heavy Assault Missile</a> Launcher rate of firdamage Trait for item "Claymore" (22468)
501930 Industrial Reconfiguration Capital Industrial Reconfiguration Capital Industrial Reconfiguration
501931 This certificate represents a level of competence in handling Industrial Core modules. The holder has learned that Industrial Cores may only be used on Capital Industrial Ships, improving their resource processing abilities at the expense of mobility. This is a good skillset for capsuleers specializing in Industrial Capital Ship hulls. This certificate represents a level of competence in handling Capital Industrial Core modules. The holder has learned that Industrial Cores may only be used on Capital Industrial Ships, improving their resource processing abilities at the expense of mobility and enabling the use of Compression Modules. This is a good skillset for capsuleers specializing in Industrial Capital Ship hulls. This certificate represents a level of competence in handling Capital Industrial Core modules. The holder has learned that Industrial Cores may only be used on Capital Industrial Ships, improving their resource processing abilities at the expense of mobility and enabling the use of Compression Modules. This is a good skillset for capsuleers specializing in Industrial Capital Ship hulls.
506360 The Standup Reprocessing Facility is a service module that allows the use of a reprocessing and compression facilities when installed into an Upwell technology structure. The default reprocessing rate is 50%, which may be further enhanced by the use of Standup rigs.

While an Upwell Structure has at least one service module online, it will enter "full power" mode and gain significantly increased shield and armor hitpoints and an extra reinforcement cycle.

Standup is a proprietary system that uses a Structure Autonomous Nanoassembly Device (Upwell) containing integrated template software, a nanoassembler array and sufficient nanomass to enable the construction of a variety of service modules, structure modules and structure rigs when inserted into the appropriate slots on a structure built with Upwell technology.		 The Standup Reprocessing Facility is a service module that allows the use of a reprocessing and compression facilities when installed into an Upwell technology structure. The default reprocessing rate is 50%, which may be further enhanced by the use of Standup rigs. Note that this facility does not enable compression of Harvestable Gas Clouds and Moon Asteroids, which is only possible using on board compression modules fitted to Industrial Command Ships and Capital Industrial Command Ships.

While an Upwell Structure has at least one service module online, it will enter "full power" mode and gain significantly increased shield and armor hitpoints and an extra reinforcement cycle.

Standup is a proprietary system that uses a Structure Autonomous Nanoassembly Device (Upwell) containing integrated template software, a nanoassembler array and sufficient nanomass to enable the construction of a variety of service modules, structure modules and structure rigs when inserted into the appropriate slots on a structure built with Upwell technology.		 The Standup Reprocessing Facility is a service module that allows the use of a reprocessing and compression facilities when installed into an Upwell technology structure. The default reprocessing rate is 50%, which may be further enhanced by the use of Standup rigs. Note that this facility does not enable compression of Harvestable Gas Clouds and Moon Asteroids, which is only possible using on board compression modules fitted to Industrial Command Ships and Capital Industrial Command Ships.

While an Upwell Structure has at least one service module online, it will enter "full power" mode and gain significantly increased shield and armor hitpoints and an extra reinforcement cycle.

Standup is a proprietary system that uses a Structure Autonomous Nanoassembly Device (Upwell) containing integrated template software, a nanoassembler array and sufficient nanomass to enable the construction of a variety of service modules, structure modules and structure rigs when inserted into the appropriate slots on a structure built with Upwell technology.		 Description of item "Standup Reprocessing Facility I" (35899)
510189 This module spools up and then teleports the user and up to 24 nearby ships along with all drones, fighters, probes and bombs 100km in the direction the ship is facing. All ships teleported will retain their movement direction and velocity in the new location.

Note: The micro jump field only affects capsuleer-piloted ships and will not move certain ship types, including; Capital Ships, Freighters, and the Orca.		 This module spools up and then teleports the user and up to 24 nearby ships along with all drones, fighters, probes and bombs 100km in the direction the ship is facing. All ships teleported will retain their movement direction and velocity in the new location.

Note: The micro jump field only affects capsuleer-piloted ships and will not move certain ship types, including; Capital Ships, Freighters, and Industrial Command Ships.		 This module spools up and then teleports the user and up to 24 nearby ships along with all drones, fighters, probes and bombs 100km in the direction the ship is facing. All ships teleported will retain their movement direction and velocity in the new location.

Note: The micro jump field only affects capsuleer-piloted ships and will not move certain ship types, including; Capital Ships, Freighters, and the OrcaIndustrial Command Ships.		 Description of item "Micro Jump Field Generator" (37479)

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship or fighter squadron will be penalized.		 Description of item "Sentient Fighter Support Unit" (41417)

587898 A combination of additional fighter hangar support drones, fighter power transmitters and advanced sensor support, the Fighter Support Unit assists all areas of fighter operation. This one has been radically altered by a mutaplasmid tool that uses both Triglavian and rogue drone technologies.

Grotesquely, significant parts of the carrier ship's interior now resemble a rogue drone hive. Still, this may be the best Fighter Support Unit known to human (or rogue drone) artifice. On the other hand, it may be the worst.

Note: Can only be fitted to Carriers and Supercarriers.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship or fighter squadron will be penalized. <b>Note: Can only be fitted to: Can only be fit to Carriers, Command Carriers and Supercarriers.</b>

1009272 <font size="14">Enforcer Expert System </font>

This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly various T1 Destroyers.

The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for 14 days.

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14">Activating an Expert System</font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.		 <font size="14">Enforcer Expert System </font>

This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly various T1 Destroyers.

The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for 7 days.

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14">Activating an Expert System</font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

1009285 <font size="14">Explorer Expert System</font>

This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly an exploration Frigate fitted with basic travel, scanning and hacking equipment. It does not include the Cloaking skill and is therefore best suited for exploration of High Security space.

The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for 14 days.

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

1009295 <font size="14">Industrialist Expert System</font>

This Expert System makes available skills enabling the Capsuleer to fly a Mining Barge, such as a Covetor, and to use the Strip Miner I and Ice Harvest I modules. It also grants you access to manufacturing skills.

The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for 14 days.

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

1021655 This bioadaptive mutaplasmid interface is designed to alter the functional output and performance of modulated strip miners.

Triglavian bioadaptive technology makes extensive use of engineered colonies of extremophilic bacteria, that are used to grow, harvest and adapt various resources found in Abyssal Deadspace. Artificial colonizing plasmids integrated into specialist tools used for direct adaptation of technology can be found in Triglavian caches in various stages of development. These mutaplasmids can be used to alter the characteristics of a wide variety of equipment types, depending on the strain and the bioadaptive tool with which they are integrated.

The mutaplasmid colony integrated into this bioadaptive tool has begun to decay and mutation effects will be less pronounced as a result. While possible mutational benefits are low, the risks of using this mutaplasmid are also reduced.		 This bioadaptive mutaplasmid interface is designed to alter the functional output and performance of modulated strip miners.

Triglavian bioadaptive technology makes extensive use of engineered colonies of extremophilic bacteria, that are used to grow, harvest and adapt various resources found in Abyssal Deadspace. Artificial colonizing plasmids integrated into specialist tools used for direct adaptation of technology can be found in Triglavian caches in various stages of development. These mutaplasmids can be used to alter the characteristics of a wide variety of equipment types, depending on the strain and the bioadaptive tool with which they are integrated.

The mutaplasmid colony integrated into this bioadaptive tool appears to be mature and reproducing at a healthy rate. The mutational benefits and risks of using this mutaplasmid are within relatively balanced bounds.		 This bioadaptive mutaplasmid interface is designed to alter the functional output and performance of modulated strip miners.

Triglavian bioadaptive technology makes extensive use of engineered colonies of extremophilic bacteria, that are used to grow, harvest and adapt various resources found in Abyssal Deadspace. Artificial colonizing plasmids integrated into specialist tools used for direct adaptation of technology can be found in Triglavian caches in various stages of development. These mutaplasmids can be used to alter the characteristics of a wide variety of equipment types, depending on the strain and the bioadaptive tool with which they are integrated.

The mutaplasmid colony integrated into this bioadaptive tool has begun to decay and mutation effects will be less pronouncedappears to be mature and reproducing ast a result. Description of item "Gravid Modulated Strip Miner Mutaplasmid" (90468)
1021657 This bioadaptive mutaplasmid interface is designed to alter the functional output and performance of modulated strip miners.

Triglavian bioadaptive technology makes extensive use of engineered colonies of extremophilic bacteria, that are used to grow, harvest and adapt various resources found in Abyssal Deadspace. Artificial colonizing plasmids integrated into specialist tools used for direct adaptation of technology can be found in Triglavian caches in various stages of development. These mutaplasmids can be used to alter the characteristics of a wide variety of equipment types, depending on the strain and the bioadaptive tool with which they are integrated.

The mutaplasmid colony integrated into this bioadaptive tool has begun to decay and mutation effects will be less pronounced as a result. While possible mutational benefits are low, the risks of using this mutaplasmid are also reduced.		 This bioadaptive mutaplasmid interface is designed to alter the functional output and performance of modulated strip miners.

While possiblis highly unstable, with a high rate of reproduction and mutation. The mutational benefits are low, the risks of using this mutaplasmid are also reducedpotentially very high but the risks are also extreme. 1021874 This bioadaptive mutaplasmid interface is designed to alter the functional output and performance of ice harvesters.

Triglavian bioadaptive technology makes extensive use of engineered colonies of extremophilic bacteria, that are used to grow, harvest and adapt various resources found in Abyssal Deadspace. Artificial colonizing plasmids integrated into specialist tools used for direct adaptation of technology can be found in Triglavian caches in various stages of development. These mutaplasmids can be used to alter the characteristics of a wide variety of equipment types, depending on the strain and the bioadaptive tool with which they are integrated.

1034930 Objectives available through campaigns Objectives available through campaigns
1034931 Campaigns Campaigns
1035596 Theaters of War Theaters of War UI/Agency/ContentGroups/TheatersOfWar
1035601 Overview Overview UI/Agency/Campaigns/OverviewHeader
1035602 Campaigns mark periods of heightened focus across New Eden. During a campaign, competing interests, resources, and territories come into sharp alignment, giving rise to coordinated efforts with clear goals and limited timeframes.

Each Campaign reflects the current priorities shaping the cluster. Some are driven by war, others by industry, logistics, or control of space — but all represent moments where collective action can tip the balance.

Active Military Campaigns and their associated operations can be reviewed through the AIR Opportunities, where available objectives and points of contribution are surfaced based on current conditions. A broader view of each Campaign—its goals, progress, and significance—can be found in the Theaters of War Dashboard window.		 Campaigns mark periods of heightened focus across New Eden. During a campaign, competing interests, resources, and territories come into sharp alignment, giving rise to coordinated efforts with clear goals and limited timeframes.

Each Campaign reflects the current priorities shaping the cluster. Some are driven by war, others by industry, logistics, or control of space — but all represent moments where collective action can tip the balance.

Active Military Campaigns and their associated operations can be reviewed through the AIR Opportunities, where available objectives and points of contribution are surfaced based on current conditions. A broader view of each Campaign—its goals, progress, and significance—can be found in the Theaters of War Dashboard window.		 UI/Agency/Campaigns/OverviewText
1035603 Restrictions Restrictions UI/Agency/Campaigns/TimeframeHeader
1035604 Capsuleers may only commit to a limited number of objectives simultaneously.

You may only commit to an objective if it has not yet been completed.

Any capsuleer can contribute to the objectives of any campaign, with the exception of Factional Warfare objectives, which requires enlistment.		 Capsuleers may only commit to a limited number of objectives simultaneously.

You may only commit to an objective if it has not yet been completed.

Any capsuleer can contribute to the objectives of any campaign, with the exception of Factional Warfare objectives, which requires enlistment.		 UI/Agency/Campaigns/TimeframeText
1035605 Availability and Rewards Availability and Rewards UI/Agency/Campaigns/ParticipationHeader
1035606 Campaigns have a start and end date. Every few days, while a campaign is active, new objectives will become available. Objectives remain available until they have been completed by the capsuleer community or the campaign's end date has been reached.

Contributors to an objective may earn ISK, loyalty points, or increased standings with the campaign’s faction.		 Campaigns have a start and end date. Every few days, while a campaign is active, new objectives will become available. Objectives remain available until they have been completed by the capsuleer community or the campaign's end date has been reached.

Contributors to an objective may earn ISK, loyalty points, or increased standings with the campaign’s faction.		 UI/Agency/Campaigns/ParticipationText
1035607 Standings Standings UI/Agency/Campaigns/StandingsHeader
1035608 Participation in Military Campaigns does not inherently affect diplomatic standings. Many operations strengthen relationships through service and support, while only direct engagement in Factional Warfare hostilities carries the usual standing risks. Participation in Military Campaigns does not inherently affect diplomatic standings. Many operations strengthen relationships through service and support, while only direct engagement in Factional Warfare hostilities carries the usual standing risks. UI/Agency/Campaigns/StandingsText
1035612 Theaters of War Dashboard Theaters of War Dashboard UI/Agency/Campaigns/DashboardHeader
1035613 Browse active campaigns and start contributing. Browse active campaigns and start contributing. UI/Agency/Campaigns/DashboardText
1035616 AIR Opportunities AIR Opportunities UI/Agency/Campaigns/OpportunitiesHeader
1035617 Find campaign objectives that fit your preferred activity type. Find campaign objectives that fit your preferred activity type. UI/Agency/Campaigns/OpportunitiesText
1035624 Open Campaign Dashboard Open Campaign Dashboard UI/Agency/Campaigns/OpenDashboard
1035625 Open Opportunities Open Opportunities UI/Agency/Campaigns/OpenCampaignOpportunities
1035627 Campaigns Campaigns UI/Agency/ContentGroups/Campaigns
1035628 Join up in the current campaigns to change the future of New Eden Join up in the current campaigns to change the future of New Eden UI/Agency/ContentGroups/Descriptions/Campaigns
1035629 Campaigns provide capsuleers with opportunities to support their faction's goals by contributing to various objectives involving different areas of activities. Campaigns provide capsuleers with opportunities to support their faction's goals by contributing to various objectives involving different areas of activities. UI/Agency/Tooltips/NavigationCards/Campaigns
1036172 Veldspar is the most common ore type in the central regions of known universe. It is still in constant demand as it holds a large portion of the much-used Tritanium mineral.

Available primarily in high security status star systems.		 This low purity cluster of Veldspar offers 50% lower yield than those typically found throughout wider Ned Eden. It is most commonly located within the region of Exordium.

Veldspar is the most common ore type in the central regions of known universe. It is still in constant demand as it holds a large portion of the much-used Tritanium mineral.		 This low purity cluster of Veldspar offers 50% lower yield than those typically found throughout wider Ned Eden. It is most commonly located within the region of Exordium.

Veldspar is the most common ore type in the central regions of known universe. It is still in constant demand as it holds a large portion of the much-used <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> mineral.

Available primarily in high security status star systems.		 Description of item "Veldspar 0-Grade" (92371)
1036174 Veldspar is the most common ore type in the central regions of known universe. It is still in constant demand as it holds a large portion of the much-used Tritanium mineral.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 This low purity cluster of Veldspar offers 50% lower yield than those typically found throughout wider Ned Eden. It is most commonly located within the region of Exordium.

Veldspar is the most common ore type in the central regions of known universe. It is still in constant demand as it holds a large portion of the much-used Tritanium mineral.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 This low purity cluster of Veldspar offers 50% lower yield than those typically found throughout wider Ned Eden. It is most commonly located within the region of Exordium.

Veldspar is the most common ore type in the central regions of known universe. It is still in constant demand as it holds a large portion of the much-used <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> mineral.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 Description of item "Compressed Veldspar 0-Grade" (92372)
1036180 Scordite is amongst the most common ore types in the central regions of known universe. It has a fair bit of Tritanium and Pyerite. Good choice for those starting their mining careers.

Available primarily in high security status star systems.		 This low purity cluster of Scordite offers 50% lower yield than those typically found throughout wider Ned Eden. It is most commonly located within the region of Exordium.

Scordite is amongst the most common ore types in the central regions of known universe. It can be reprocessed into both Tritanium and Pyerite making it desirable for those starting their mining careers.		 This low purity cluster of Scordite offers 50% lower yield than those typically found throughout wider Ned Eden. It is most commonly located within the region of Exordium.

Scordite is amongst the most common ore types in the central regions of known universe. It has a fair bit of <a href=showinfo:34>can be reprocessed into both Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>. Good choice for those starting their mining careers.

Available primarily in high security status star systemPyerite making it desirable for those starting their mining careers.		 Description of item "Scordite 0-Grade " (92373)
1036182 Scordite is amongst the most common ore types in the central regions of known universe. It has a fair bit of Tritanium and Pyerite. Good choice for those starting their mining careers.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 This low purity cluster of Scordite offers 50% lower yield than those typically found throughout wider Ned Eden. It is more commonly located within the region of Exordium.

Scordite is amongst the most common ore types in the central regions of known universe. It can be reprocessed into both Tritanium and Pyerite making it desirable for those starting their mining careers.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 This low purity cluster of Scordite offers 50% lower yield than those typically found throughout wider Ned Eden. It is more commonly located within the region of Exordium.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 Description of item "Compressed Scordite 0-Grade" (92374)
1036301 Angel Info Shard S Angel Info Siphon Angel Info Shard Siphon Name of item 92396 (Scatter Container)
1036302 If you have the right equipment you might be able to hack into the info shard and get some valuable information. With a Data Analyzer you might be able to hack this info siphon and recover some valuable data. If you have the right equipment you might be able to hack into the info shard and getWith a Data Analyzer you might be able to hack this info siphon and recover some valuable informationdata. Description of item "Angel Info Siphon" (92396)
1036402 In YC128, a new region was made available through the combined efforts of CONCORD and AIR Laboratories. Thanks to an amendment to the Yulai Accords this region, dubbed Exordium, was held under Elevated Security protocols. Here, under CONCORD's protection and with the guidance of AIR, the people of New Eden would be free to reach their full potential without the conflicts that plagued the wider cluster.

Within Exordium capsuleers are unable to disable their capsule’s safety protocols.		 In YC128, a new region was made available through the combined efforts of CONCORD and AIR Laboratories. Thanks to an amendment to the Yulai Accords this region, dubbed Exordium, was held under Elevated Security protocols. Here, under CONCORD's protection and with the guidance of AIR, the people of New Eden would be free to reach their full potential without the conflicts that plagued the wider cluster.

Within Exordium capsuleers are unable to disable their capsule’s safety protocols.		 Description for region Exordium (10001004)

1037358 Raspite X-Grade Raspite X-Grade Name of item 92565 (Raspite)
1037359 This variant of Raspite ore is especially prized by Amarr engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Empire needed them.

Unlike regular Raspite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into Tritanium and Pyerite, as well as providing Crystalline Raspite, which is valuable to the Amarr Empire.		 This variant of Raspite ore is especially prized by Amarr engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Empire needed them.

Unlike regular Raspite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92569>Crystalline Raspite</a>, which is valuable to the Amarr Empire.		 Description of item "Raspite X-Grade" (92565)
1037360 Polycrase X-Grade Polycrase X-Grade Name of item 92566 (Polycrase)
1037361 This variant of Polycrase ore is especially prized by Caldari engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the State needed them.

Unlike regular Polycrase ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into Tritanium and Pyerite, as well as providing Crystalline Polycrase, which is valuable to the Caldari State.		 This variant of Polycrase ore is especially prized by Caldari engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the State needed them.

Unlike regular Polycrase ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92570>Crystalline Polycrase</a>, which is valuable to the Caldari State.		 Description of item "Polycrase X-Grade" (92566)
1037362 Moissanite X-Grade Moissanite X-Grade Name of item 92567 (Moissanite)
1037363 This variant of Moissanite ore is especially prized by Gallente engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Federation needed them.

Unlike regular Moissanite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into Tritanium and Pyerite, as well as providing Crystalline Moissanite, which is valuable to the Gallente Federation.		 This variant of Moissanite ore is especially prized by Gallente engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Federation needed them.

Unlike regular Moissanite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92571>Crystalline Moissanite</a>, which is valuable to the Gallente Federation.		 Description of item "Moissanite X-Grade" (92567)
1037364 Kangite X-Grade Kangite X-Grade Name of item 92568 (Kangite)
1037365 This variant of Kangite ore is especially prized by Minmatar engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Republic needed them.

Unlike regular Kangite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into Tritanium and Pyerite, as well as providing Crystalline Kangite, which is valuable to the Minmatar Republic.		 This variant of Kangite ore is especially prized by Minmatar engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Republic needed them.

Unlike regular Kangite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92572>Crystalline Kangite</a>, which is valuable to the Minmatar Republic.		 Description of item "Kangite X-Grade" (92568)

1038067 Imperial War Reserves mining operations are usually organized around combined naval and logistical units typically commanded by a Cardinal Lieutenant.

The Imperial War Reserves were established as a joint effort to build up and maintain a vast reserve of strategically vital materials by the Amarr Ministry of Assessment and the Ministry of War. The corporation is charged with surveying the Amarr Empire for resources and organizing their exploitation by mining operations.		 Imperial War Reserves mining operations are usually organized around combined naval and logistical units typically commanded by a Cardinal Lieutenant.

The Imperial War Reserves were established as a joint effort to build up and maintain a vast reserve of strategically vital materials by the Amarr Ministry of Assessment and the Ministry of War. The corporation is charged with surveying the Amarr Empire for resources and organizing their exploitation by mining operations.

The Imperial War Reserves were established as a joint effort to build up and maintain a vast reserve of strategically vital materials by the Amarr Ministry of Assessment and the Ministry of War. The corporation is charged with surveying the Amarr Empire for resources and organizing their exploitation by mining operations.		 Description of item "Crucifier Navy Issue War Reserves Lieutenant SKIN" (92779)

1038086 State Military Stockpile resource harvesting operations are considered a high priority and often commanded by a Captain of Engineers.

The State Military Stockpile was created by order of the Caldari State's Chief Executive Panel to seek out and develop militarily important resources within Caldari space. The Caldari Navy and the security forces of the "Big Eight" megacorporations are all able to draw from the deep reserves that are being built up by State Military Stockpile mining operations.		 State Military Stockpile resource harvesting operations are considered a high priority and often commanded by a Captain of Engineers.

The State Military Stockpile was created by order of the Caldari State's Chief Executive Panel to seek out and develop militarily important resources within Caldari space. The Caldari Navy and the security forces of the "Big Eight" megacorporations are all able to draw from the deep reserves that are being built up by State Military Stockpile mining operations.

The Caldari Navy and the security forces of the "Big Eight" megacorporations are all able to draw from the deep reserves that are being built up by State Military Stockpile mining operations.		 State Military Stockpile resource harvesting operations are considered a high priority and often commanded by a Captain of Engineers.

The State Military Stockpile was created by order of the Caldari State's Chief Executive Panel to seek out and develop militarily important resources within Caldari space. The Caldari Navy and the security forces of the "Big Eight" megacorporations are all able to draw from the deep reserves that are being built up by State Military Stockpile mining operations.

The State Military Stockpile was created by order of the Caldari State's Chief Executive Panel to seek out and develop militarily important resources within Caldari space. The Caldari Navy and the security forces of the "Big Eight" megacorporations are all able to draw from the deep reserves that are being built up by State Military Stockpile mining operations.		 State Military Stockpile resource harvesting operations are considered a high priority and often commanded by a Captain of Engineers.

The State Military Stockpile was created by order of the Caldari State's Chief Executive Panel to seek out and develop militarily important resources within Caldari space. The Caldari Navy and the security forces of the "Big Eight" megacorporations are all able to draw from the deep reserves that are being built up by State Military Stockpile mining operations.		 Description of item "Raven Navy Issue Military Stockpile Captain SKIN" (92790)
1038103 Raven Navy Issue Military Stockpile Captain SKIN Raven Navy Issue Military Stockpile Captain SKIN Name of item 92790 (Permanent SKIN)
1038104 Federal Strategic Materiel exploration and mining operations are usually commanded by a Defender Lieutenant specializing in engineering or logistics.

The Federal Strategic Materiel corporation was founded by executive order of President Jacus Roden and is tasked with finding and extracting resources vital to the Federal armed forces throughout Gallente space. The mining operations sent out to harvest resources from sites discovered by the Federal Strategic Materiel corporation have become a common sight in the Federation.		 Federal Strategic Materiel exploration and mining operations are usually commanded by a Defender Lieutenant specializing in engineering or logistics.

The Federal Strategic Materiel corporation was founded by executive order of President Jacus Roden and is tasked with finding and extracting resources vital to the Federal armed forces throughout Gallente space. The mining operations sent out to harvest resources from sites discovered by the Federal Strategic Materiel corporation have become a common sight in the Federation.

1038122 Republic Fleet Ordnance mining and shipping operations are overseen by a technical specialist officer, usually of Spike Lieutenant rank.

Republic Fleet Ordnance is responsible for the acquisition of materials crucial to the construction and maintenance of all kinds of equipment used by the fighting forces of the Minmatar Republic. The resource scouts of Republic Fleet Ordnance scour Minmatar space for pockets of useful asteroids and can call upon mining operations to extract any valuable materials they discover. 1038221 Raspite Raspite Description of group ID 5083
1038222 Polycrase Polycrase Description of group ID 5084
1038223 Moissanite Moissanite Description of group ID 5085
1038224 Kangite Kangite Description of group ID 5086
1038238 Compressed Raspite X-Grade Compressed Raspite X-Grade Name of item 92818 (Raspite)
1038239 This variant of Raspite ore is especially prized by Amarr engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Empire needed them.

Unlike regular Raspite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into Tritanium and Pyerite, as well as providing Crystalline Raspite, which is valuable to the Amarr Empire.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 This variant of Raspite ore is especially prized by Amarr engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Empire needed them.

Unlike regular Raspite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92569>Crystalline Raspite</a>, which is valuable to the Amarr Empire.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 Description of item "Compressed Raspite X-Grade" (92818)
1038240 Compressed Polycrase X-Grade Compressed Polycrase X-Grade Name of item 92819 (Polycrase)
1038241 This variant of Polycrase ore is especially prized by Caldari engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the State needed them.

Unlike regular Polycrase ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into Tritanium and Pyerite, as well as providing Crystalline Polycrase, which is valuable to the Caldari State.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 This variant of Polycrase ore is especially prized by Caldari engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the State needed them.

Unlike regular Polycrase ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92570>Crystalline Polycrase</a>, which is valuable to the Caldari State.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 Description of item "Compressed Polycrase X-Grade" (92819)
1038242 Compressed Moissanite X-Grade Compressed Moissanite X-Grade Name of item 92820 (Moissanite)
1038243 This variant of Moissanite ore is especially prized by Gallente engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Federation needed them.

Unlike regular Moissanite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into Tritanium and Pyerite, as well as providing Crystalline Moissanite, which is valuable to the Gallente Federation.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 This variant of Moissanite ore is especially prized by Gallente engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Federation needed them.

Unlike regular Moissanite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92571>Crystalline Moissanite</a>, which is valuable to the Gallente Federation.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 Description of item "Compressed Moissanite X-Grade" (92820)
1038244 Compressed Kangite X-Grade Compressed Kangite X-Grade Name of item 92821 (Kangite)
1038245 This variant of Kangite ore is especially prized by Minmatar engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Republic needed them.

Unlike regular Kangite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into Tritanium and Pyerite, as well as providing Crystalline Kangite, which is valuable to the Minmatar Republic.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 This variant of Kangite ore is especially prized by Minmatar engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Republic needed them.

Unlike regular Kangite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92572>Crystalline Kangite</a>, which is valuable to the Minmatar Republic.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 Description of item "Compressed Kangite X-Grade" (92821)
1038246 Only united in faith can our Empire forge a path to salvation. Only united in faith can our Empire forge a path to salvation.
1038247 Salvation Salvation Name of item 92822 (Command Carrier)
1038248 Royal Heir Arim Ardishapur Royal Heir Arim Ardishapur
1038249 As the dust settled following the Warpath conflict of YC128, many smaller holdings on the fringes of the Amarr Empire fell into chaos. The constant onslaughts of Minmatar Republic strike teams had left these communities exposed to pirate attacks and vulnerable to internal revolt. Local holders sought a means to reimpose control while relying on their own fleets, which unlike the Imperial Navy, were largely made up of small and medium-sized ships.

They needed a way to improve the operational efficiency of these fleets while also demonstrating the awesome power of the Empire that backs them. Carthum Conglomerate’s solution to this problem was the Salvation. An advanced support carrier with robust command burst functions, it was capable of elevating a group of lesser vessels into an unstoppable armada.		 As the dust settled following the Warpath conflict of YC128, many smaller holdings on the fringes of the Amarr Empire fell into chaos. The constant onslaughts of Minmatar Republic strike teams had left these communities exposed to pirate attacks and vulnerable to internal revolt. Local holders sought a means to reimpose control while relying on their own fleets, which unlike the Imperial Navy, were largely made up of small and medium-sized ships.

They needed a way to improve the operational efficiency of these fleets while also demonstrating the awesome power of the Empire that backs them. Carthum Conglomerate’s solution to this problem was the Salvation. An advanced support carrier with robust command burst functions, it was capable of elevating a group of lesser vessels into an unstoppable armada.		 Description of item "Salvation" (92822)
1038250 Dishonor one, earn the fury of all. Dishonor one, earn the fury of all.
1038251 Simurgh Simurgh Name of item 92823 (Command Carrier)
1038252 Brigadier General Heika Torigo Brigadier General Heika Torigo
1038253 Following their betrayal by the Intaki Syndicate in YC128, the Caldari State annexed the entire region of Syndicate. This annexation did not end lawlessness within the region. The CEP declared that for far too long, criminal organizations had abused the semi-legal status of Syndicate for their own means. They charged the Caldari Navy with bringing the rule of law to the region.

To support these efforts, Kaalakiota developed the Simurgh. Its operational superiority was a threat that the criminal forces of Syndicate could not match. A mobile command centre with advanced combat capabilities, its mission was to bring honor to the lawless reaches of space.		 Following their betrayal by the Intaki Syndicate in YC128, the Caldari State annexed the entire region of Syndicate. This annexation did not end lawlessness within the region. The CEP declared that for far too long, criminal organizations had abused the semi-legal status of Syndicate for their own means. They charged the Caldari Navy with bringing the rule of law to the region.

To support these efforts, Kaalakiota developed the Simurgh. Its operational superiority was a threat that the criminal forces of Syndicate could not match. A mobile command centre with advanced combat capabilities, its mission was to bring honor to the lawless reaches of space.		 Description of item "Simurgh" (92823)
1038254 Power and resilience can win battles, but speed and intelligence win wars. Power and resilience can win battles, but speed and intelligence win wars.
1038255 Gaia Gaia Name of item 92824 (Command Carrier)
1038256 President Alix Moreau President Alix Moreau
1038257 Predicting that superior fleet support was going to be key to future engagements as the Warpath conflict of YC128 began, President Alix Moreau reached out to Duvolle Labs to commission work on a more advanced carrier design.

The team at Duvolle Labs was given unprecedented access to fleet telemetry research data to inform their design choices. They were charged with producing a ship that demonstrated the life-saving impact that advanced operational intel could have on a fleet, a flagship for Moreau’s vision of a more innovative Gallente future.		 Predicting that superior fleet support was going to be key to future engagements as the Warpath conflict of YC128 began, President Alix Moreau reached out to Duvolle Labs to commission work on a more advanced carrier design.

The team at Duvolle Labs was given unprecedented access to fleet telemetry research data to inform their design choices. They were charged with producing a ship that demonstrated the life-saving impact that advanced operational intel could have on a fleet, a flagship for Moreau’s vision of a more innovative Gallente future.		 Description of item "Gaia" (92824)
1038258 Everyone fights, everyone makes it home. Everyone fights, everyone makes it home.
1038259 Ymir Ymir Name of item 92825 (Command Carrier)
1038260 Sebiestor Chief Acassa Midular Sebiestor Chief Acassa Midular
1038261 Following the escalating conflict of YC128, the Sebiestor Chief Acassa Midular called upon Core Complexion to create an elevated war platform capable of supporting the rapid response fleets she felt would be essential to Minmatar's success in the next war to come.

Core Complexion took the Nidhoggur's classic design and elevated it with the latest advancements in fleet support technology. Superior command support technologies allow it to unlock greater speed and resilience for its accompanying fleet members. It is the ultimate expression of the Republic's military doctrine, supercharged by the technical brilliance that Core Complexion and the Sebiestor have become synonymous with.		 Following the escalating conflict of YC128, the Sebiestor Chief Acassa Midular called upon Core Complexion to create an elevated war platform capable of supporting the rapid response fleets she felt would be essential to Minmatar's success in the next war to come.

Core Complexion took the Nidhoggur's classic design and elevated it with the latest advancements in fleet support technology. Superior command support technologies allow it to unlock greater speed and resilience for its accompanying fleet members. It is the ultimate expression of the Republic's military doctrine, supercharged by the technical brilliance that Core Complexion and the Sebiestor have become synonymous with.		 Description of item "Ymir" (92825)

1038326 This beacon marks a moderate military location. The entry gate is configured to admit Tech I and empire faction navy ships of Battlecruiser size or smaller.

The security features installed in this acceleration gate will prevent activation by any ship that is fitted with warp core stabilizer modules.		 This beacon marks a moderate military location. The entry gate is configured to admit Tech I and empire faction navy ships of Battlecruiser size or smaller.

1038346 Command Ops systems are adjacent to Frontline systems.
