1038347 Rearguard systems are relatively secure locations. They are not adjacent to the Frontlines. Complexes secured here provide vastly reduced LP rewards. <b>Rearguard</b> systems are relatively secure locations. They are not adjacent to the <b>Frontlines</b>. Complexes secured here provide vastly reduced LP rewards. UI/FactionWarfare/frontlines/BackLineHint
1038349 Bulwark Systems are high-security locations that support but are not a part of the warzone. They cannot be captured or influenced and include the faction's War HQ and shipcaster. Activities that are related to each faction's ambitions and campaigns may appear here. <b>Bulwark</b> Systems are high-security locations that support but are not a part of the warzone. They cannot be captured or influenced and include the faction's War HQ and shipcaster. Activities that are related to each faction's ambitions and campaigns may appear here. 1038405 You are leaving Exordium for the wider New Eden cluster, where capsuleers act freely and every choice shapes the future.

Exordium remains accessible, but beyond its limits greater opportunities and risks await.

This shipcaster sends you deep into this faction’s territory, many jumps from the gate back to Exordium.

The stars are only the beginning. Good luck, Captain.		 You are leaving Exordium for the wider New Eden cluster, where capsuleers act freely and every choice shapes the future.

1039000 FWChaosDungeon20 - Implicit Overheating Bonus - Includes Ewar FWChaosDungeon20 - Implicit Overheating Bonus - Includes Ewar Name of item 93049 (Cloud)
1039143 - Safe from others. Responsible for yourself.

Elevated Security protocols prohibit the disabling of ship safety, making violence between capsuleer impossible.

Despite this, reckless combat against hostile non-capsuleers may still result in the loss of your ship.

These protocols are present within Exordium, a designated training area for capsuleers.

The region can be exited via the Yulai gate in the central system of Mandate, or by using the one-time Empire Shipcasters which connect Empire controlled embassy systems to that Empire’s sovereign space.		 <b>- Safe from others. Responsible for yourself.</b>

Elevated Security protocols prohibit the disabling of ship safety, making violence between capsuleer impossible.

Despite this, reckless combat against hostile non-capsuleers may still result in the loss of your ship.

These protocols are present within Exordium, a designated training area for capsuleers.

The region can be exited via the Yulai gate in the central system of Mandate, or by using the one-time Empire Shipcasters which connect Empire controlled embassy systems to that Empire’s sovereign space.		 UI/Map/Filters/Security/secRangeDescriptionSafeSec
1039144 - Punished, not prevented.

Areas of space with active CONCORD enforcement. Illegal aggression will trigger a rapid CONCORD response that destroys the offender, but attacks can still occur before that response arrives.

Legal forms of aggression are allowed. Capsuleers flagged as “suspects” may be legally attacked, corporations may declare war on one another, and strikes may come from those who accept CONCORD's deadly retribution.		 <b>- Punished, not prevented.</b>

Areas of space with active CONCORD enforcement. Illegal aggression will trigger a rapid CONCORD response that destroys the offender, but attacks can still occur before that response arrives.

Legal forms of aggression are allowed. Capsuleers flagged as “suspects” may be legally attacked, corporations may declare war on one another, and strikes may come from those who accept CONCORD's deadly retribution.		 UI/Map/Filters/Security/secRangeDescriptionHighSec
1039145 - Limited law enforcement, real risk.

Areas of space with reduced law enforcement. CONCORD forces do not respond to aggression, although sentry guns do guard gates and stations.

Capsuleers may attack one another more freely. Piracy, Factional Warfare, and small-scale conflicts are common.		 <b>- Limited law enforcement, real risk.</b>

Areas of space with reduced law enforcement. CONCORD forces do not respond to aggression, although sentry guns do guard gates and stations.

Capsuleers may attack one another more freely. Piracy, Factional Warfare, and small-scale conflicts are common.		 UI/Map/Filters/Security/secRangeDescriptionLowSec
1039147 - Claim it, defend it.

There is no CONCORD presence and no automatic law enforcement.

Capsuleer alliances may claim sovereignty over much of this space, building their own infrastructure. It is up to capsuleers to protect their own space. Unrestricted combat and large-scale wars are a part of daily life.		 <b>- Claim it, defend it.</b>

There is no CONCORD presence and no automatic law enforcement.

Capsuleer alliances may claim sovereignty over much of this space, building their own infrastructure. It is up to capsuleers to protect their own space. Unrestricted combat and large-scale wars are a part of daily life.		 UI/Map/Filters/Security/secRangeDescriptionNullSec
1039148 - Hidden threats, hidden treasures.

 Uncharted systems with no security status and no local communication channel. These system contain bountiful resources but are also home to unknown threats. There is no CONCORD or faction protection, and no capsuleer may claim sovereignty over them.

Accessible only through unstable wormholes, these systems exist outside the normal bounds of New Eden. Their ever shifting connections mean that wormhole space is not visible on the map.		 <b>- Hidden threats, hidden treasures.</b>

 Uncharted systems with no security status and no local communication channel. These system contain bountiful resources but are also home to unknown threats. There is no CONCORD or faction protection, and no capsuleer may claim sovereignty over them.

Accessible only through unstable wormholes, these systems exist outside the normal bounds of New Eden. Their ever shifting connections mean that wormhole space is not visible on the map.		 UI/Map/Filters/Security/secRangeDescriptionWormholes
1039150 - Prove fitness through adaptation.

A region annexed by the Triglavian Collective with no CONCORD presence and restricted access. Local communications are altered, standings influence survival, and environmental effects shape combat.

It is a volatile space where ambush warfare is common and high risks are balanced with incredible opportunities.		 <b>- Prove fitness through adaptation. </b>

A region annexed by the Triglavian Collective with no CONCORD presence and restricted access. Local communications are altered, standings influence survival, and environmental effects shape combat.

It is a volatile space where ambush warfare is common and high risks are balanced with incredible opportunities.		 UI/Map/Filters/Security/secRangeDescriptionPochven

1039272 This beacon marks a small elite military location. The entry gate is configured to admit all ships of destroyer or smaller size of any tech level.

The security features installed in this acceleration gate will prevent activation by any ship that is fitted with warp core stabilizer modules.		 This beacon marks a small elite military location. The entry gate is configured to admit all ships of destroyer or smaller size of any tech level.

1039323 Elevated Security protocols apply in this system in addition to normal <color={color}>1.0</color> security status restrictions.

CONCORD prohibits disabling of ship safety, prohibiting all violence between capsuleers.

Be aware that protocols do not apply to illegal hostile operators, and reckless engagement may still result in the destruction of your ship.		 Elevated Security protocols apply in this system in addition to normal <color={color}>1.0</color> security status restrictions.

CONCORD prohibits disabling of ship safety, prohibiting all violence between capsuleers.

Be aware that protocols do not apply to illegal hostile operators, and reckless engagement may still result in the destruction of your ship.		 UI/SecurityStatus/StarterSecDescription
1039326 Controlled space with strong CONCORD enforcement. Illegal aggression triggers a rapid CONCORD response that destroys the offender, but attacks can still occur before punishment arrives. War declarations, suspect mechanics, and suicide strikes are part of life here. Controlled space with strong CONCORD enforcement. Illegal aggression triggers a rapid CONCORD response that destroys the offender, but attacks can still occur before punishment arrives. War declarations, suspect mechanics, and suicide strikes are part of life here. UI/SecurityStatus/HighSecDescription
1039327 Empire space with reduced law enforcement. CONCORD does not respond to aggression, though sentry guns guard gates and stations. Pilots can attack more freely, and piracy, faction warfare, and small-scale conflict are common. Empire space with reduced law enforcement. 1039328 No CONCORD presence and no automatic law enforcement. Player alliances claim sovereignty, build infrastructure, and defend territory through force. Bubbles, unrestricted combat, and large-scale wars define daily life. No CONCORD presence and no automatic law enforcement. Player alliances claim sovereignty, build infrastructure, and defend territory through force. Bubbles, unrestricted combat, and large-scale wars define daily life. 1039329 Uncharted systems with no local channel, no CONCORD, and no Capsuleer sovereignty. Rich resources but unknown threats. Uncharted systems with no local channel, no CONCORD, and no Capsuleer sovereignty. Rich resources but unknown threats. UI/SecurityStatus/WormholeDescription
1039332 A sealed Triglavian region with no CONCORD presence and restricted access. Local communications are altered, standings influence survival, and environmental effects shape combat. A volatile space of shifting control, ambush warfare, and high-risk opportunity. A sealed Triglavian region with no CONCORD presence and restricted access. UI/SecurityStatus/PochvenDescription
1039457 Prototype 'Pluto' Mining Drone Prototype 'Pluto' Mining Drone Name of item 93143 (Mining Drone)
1039458 A prototype drone developed by CreoDron based on ORE's 'Excavator' mining drone design by incorporating experimental rogue drone technology. The harvesting protocols have been altered to behave much more like a Rogue Drone would when salvaging and recycling materials to be brought back to a rogue drone hive. The result is a far more efficient mining process creating less residue, albeit a slower one resulting in lower mining yields over time.

Currently this drone is unsuitable for mass production due to a high rejection rate with the rogue drone technology. CreoDron is hoping to improve their understanding of this process from knowledge gained from the Gallente Federation Military Campaign operation 'Rogue Edge'.		 A prototype drone developed by CreoDron based on ORE's 'Excavator' mining drone design by incorporating experimental rogue drone technology. The harvesting protocols have been altered to behave much more like a Rogue Drone would when salvaging and recycling materials to be brought back to a rogue drone hive. The result is a far more efficient mining process creating less residue, albeit a slower one resulting in lower mining yields over time.

Currently this drone is unsuitable for mass production due to a high rejection rate with the rogue drone technology. CreoDron is hoping to improve their understanding of this process from knowledge gained from the Gallente Federation Military Campaign operation 'Rogue Edge'.		 Description of item "Prototype 'Pluto' Mining Drone" (93143)

1039503 Secret Operations Subcapital Operations Secretubcapital Operations Name of item 93150 (Standard Expert Systems)
1039504 <font size="14">Secrets Operations Expert System</font>

This Expert System has.... secrets

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active 1 day rental period.
As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14">Activating an Expert System</font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.		 <font size="14">Secrets Operations Expert System</font>

This Expert System has been loaded with advanced ship operation skills, to mimic experience of an Omega capsuleer.

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active 1 day rental period.
As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14">Activating an Expert System</font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.		 <font size="14"><b>Secrets Operations Expert System</b></font>

This Expert System has.... secrets been loaded with advanced ship operation skills, to mimic experience of an Omega capsuleer.

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active <b>1 day</b> rental period.
As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14"><b>Activating an Expert System</b></font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

<i>Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.</i>		 Description of item "Subcapital Operations" (93150)
1039597 Capture the Contested Field Research Facility for your enlisted faction. Fierce fighting has been taking place over a field research facility experimenting with drifter technology taken from the Caldari drifter hive Conflux Eyrie, causing a containment breach of spatial effects it was experimenting on to spill out into the surrounding space, these effects are not hazardous to ships and personnel, but may cause local disruptions or enhancements to ships and modules.

<color=#7fffffff>Ship Restrictions: </color>All Destroyers and Frigates, including Tech I, Tech II, Tech III, faction and pirate ships.
<color=#7fffffff>Time to capture:</color> 20 minutes

Rewards
<color=#7fffffff>Loyalty Points: </color>30000
<color=#7fffffff>Victory Points: </color>300
<color=#7fffffff>Scaling: </color>Up to 10 pilots.		 Capture the Contested Field Research Facility for your enlisted faction. Rewards

<color=#7fffffff>Scaling: </color>Up to 10 pilots.

<color=#7fffffff>Scaling: </color>Up to 10 pilots.
1039600 Capture the Contested Field Research Facility for your enlisted faction. Fierce fighting has been taking place over a field research facility experimenting with drifter technology taken from the Amarr drifter hive Sanctified Vidette, causing a containment breach of spatial effects it was experimenting on to spill out into the surrounding space, these effects are not hazardous to ships and personnel, but may cause local disruptions or enhancements to ships and modules.

<color=#7fffffff>Ship Restrictions: </color>All Destroyers and Frigates, including Tech I, Tech II, Tech III, faction and pirate ships.
<color=#7fffffff>Time to capture:</color> 20 minutes

Rewards
<color=#7fffffff>Loyalty Points: </color>30000
<color=#7fffffff>Victory Points: </color>300
<color=#7fffffff>Scaling: </color>Up to 10 pilots		 Capture the Contested Field Research Facility for your enlisted faction. Fierce fighting has been taking place over a field research facility experimenting with drifter technology taken from the Amarr drifter hive Sanctified Vidette, causing a containment breach of spatial effects it was experimenting on to spill out into the surrounding space, these effects are not hazardous to ships and personnel, but may cause local disruptions or enhancements to ships and modules.

<color=#7fffffff>Ship Restrictions: </color>All Destroyers and Frigates, including Tech I, Tech II, Tech III, faction and pirate ships.
<color=#7fffffff>Time to capture:</color> 20 minutes

Rewards
<color=#7fffffff>Loyalty Points: </color>30000
<color=#7fffffff>Victory Points: </color>300
<color=#7fffffff>Scaling: </color>Up to 10 pilots

1039728 Republic Intelligence Exfil Republic Intelligence Exfil Name for dungeon 14080
1039729 To experience the Amarr perspective on the Great Rebellion, you entered a simulation of the Battle of Golgothan Fields. Fresh from Jovian defeat, you helped a Dreadnought get back in the fight and take on the Minmatar. Sacrificing it all to claim victory, you proved the power of Amarrian faith. To experience the Amarr perspective on the Great Rebellion, you entered a simulation of the Battle of Golgothan Fields. Fresh from Jovian defeat, you helped a Dreadnought get back in the fight and take on the Minmatar. Sacrificing it all to claim victory, you proved the power of Amarrian faith.
1039730 The Amarr have invited you to relive their historic battle with the Minmatar at the Golgothan Fields. Travel to the simulation site and follow the instructions to be a part of this historic epic. The Amarr have invited you to relive their historic battle with the Minmatar at the Golgothan Fields. Travel to the simulation site and follow the instructions to be a part of this historic epic.
1039731 Empress be praised. Make your way to the simulation site. We will discuss further once you arrive. Empress be praised. Make your way to the simulation site. We will discuss further once you arrive.
1039732 Witness our inevitable destiny and our rightful dominion over the stars. This simulation is a pale mirror of the glorious light of that destiny, and yet it shines so bright.

Travel to the simulation site, and I shall instruct you as you feel the power of our faith.		 Witness our inevitable destiny and our rightful dominion over the stars. This simulation is a pale mirror of the glorious light of that destiny, and yet it shines so bright.

Travel to the simulation site, and I shall instruct you as you feel the power of our faith.
1039733 Witness our inevitable destiny and our rightful dominion over the stars. This simulation is a pale mirror of the glorious light of that destiny, and yet it shines so bright.

Travel to the simulation site, and I shall instruct you as you feel the power of our faith.		 Witness our inevitable destiny and our rightful dominion over the stars. This simulation is a pale mirror of the glorious light of that destiny, and yet it shines so bright.

Travel to the simulation site, and I shall instruct you as you feel the power of our faith.
1039734 You may turn towards the shadows, but the light shines still. Return when you are ready to give in to faith. You may turn towards the shadows, but the light shines still. Return when you are ready to give in to faith.
1039735 Our past is but a stepping stone to our inevitable destiny and our rightful dominion over the stars. This simulation is a pale mirror of the glorious light of that destiny, and yet it shines so bright.

Travel to the simulation site, and I shall instruct you as you feel the power of our faith.		 Our past is but a stepping stone to our inevitable destiny and our rightful dominion over the stars. This simulation is a pale mirror of the glorious light of that destiny, and yet it shines so bright.

Travel to the simulation site, and I shall instruct you as you feel the power of our faith.
1039736 You may turn towards the shadows, but the light shines still. Return when you are ready to give in to faith. You may turn towards the shadows, but the light shines still. Return when you are ready to give in to faith.
1039737 In the most recent of the simulated settings, you fought alongside the Federation fleet that liberated Intaki. Taking out Caldari defenses, you helped free the people of Intaki from megacorporate control. In the most recent of the simulated settings, you fought alongside the Federation fleet that liberated Intaki. Taking out Caldari defenses, you helped free the people of Intaki from megacorporate control.
1039738 The Gallente have invited you to join them in a simulation of the Liberation of Intaki. Travel to the simulation site and follow the instructions to fight for freedom side by side with the Federation. The Gallente have invited you to join them in a simulation of the Liberation of Intaki. Travel to the simulation site and follow the instructions to fight for freedom side by side with the Federation.
1039739 Nice. Make your way to the simulation site. I will meet you there. Nice. Make your way to the simulation site. I will meet you there.
1039740 Fight for freedom in this simulation where you’ll learn just what it means to be on the right side of history.

Travel to the simulation sire, and let’s go on a journey of justice together.		 Fight for freedom in this simulation where you’ll learn just what it means to be on the right side of history.

Travel to the simulation sire, and let’s go on a journey of justice together.
1039741 The fight for freedom is a never ending one.

Join our campaigns and serve justice, or enlist at one of our milita offices and fight the good fight.		 The fight for freedom is a never ending one.

Join our campaigns and serve justice, or enlist at one of our milita offices and fight the good fight.
1039742 That’s your choice, and I respect it. Come back when you’re ready to fight for your freedom. That’s your choice, and I respect it. Come back when you’re ready to fight for your freedom.
1039743 The battle for freedom is a battle we must fight every day In this simulation you’ll learn just what it means to fight on the right side of history.

Travel to the simulation site, and let’s go on a journey of justice together.		 The battle for freedom is a battle we must fight every day In this simulation you’ll learn just what it means to fight on the right side of history.

Travel to the simulation site, and let’s go on a journey of justice together.
1039744 That’s your choice, and I respect it. Come back when you’re ready to fight for your freedom. That’s your choice, and I respect it. Come back when you’re ready to fight for your freedom.
1039745 You entered a simulation of the Caldari’s exodus from Caldari Prime. You faced down the Gallente Federation, fought alongside a hero from Caldari history, and helped the people of Caldari escape to a new home. You entered a simulation of the Caldari’s exodus from Caldari Prime. You faced down the Gallente Federation, fought alongside a hero from Caldari history, and helped the people of Caldari escape to a new home.
1039746 The Caldari have invited you to experience their proudest and darkest day. Make your way to the simulation site and follow the instructions to see what it was like to be a part of the Caldari Breakout. The Caldari have invited you to experience their proudest and darkest day. Make your way to the simulation site and follow the instructions to see what it was like to be a part of the Caldari Breakout.
1039748 Excellent. Make your way to the simulation site. I will contact you on arrival. Excellent. Make your way to the simulation site. I will contact you on arrival.
1039749 The Caldari State invites you to experience why we fight, and why you should join us. Learn the meaning of honor, of duty, of what it means to be Caldari, as you experience our greatest loss and our most epic triumph.

Travel to the simulation site. Once you arrive, we will speak again.		 The Caldari State invites you to experience why we fight, and why you should join us. Learn the meaning of honor, of duty, of what it means to be Caldari, as you experience our greatest loss and our most epic triumph.

Travel to the simulation site. Once you arrive, we will speak again.
1039750 Now you understand what we have lost and what we fight for still.

When you are ready to earn your honor, search out our campaigns or our militia offices.		 Now you understand what we have lost and what we fight for still.

When you are ready to earn your honor, search out our campaigns or our militia offices.
1039751 Understood. Return when you are ready to learn the meaning of honor. Understood. Return when you are ready to learn the meaning of honor.
1039752 The Caldari State welcomes your interest in our history. This experience will show you why we fight, and why you should join us. Learn the meaning of honor, of duty, of what it means to be Caldari, as you experience our greatest loss and our most epic triumph.

Travel to the simulation site. Once you arrive, we will speak again.		 The Caldari State welcomes your interest in our history. This experience will show you why we fight, and why you should join us. Learn the meaning of honor, of duty, of what it means to be Caldari, as you experience our greatest loss and our most epic triumph.

Travel to the simulation site. Once you arrive, we will speak again.
1039753 Understood. Return when you are ready to learn the meaning of honor. Understood. Return when you are ready to learn the meaning of honor.
1039754 Entering a simulation of the Minmatar’s past, you took part in the Battle of Pator. You fought Imperial occupiers and faced down a supercarrier in a deadly battle. Ultimately, you defeated the Amarr and reclaimed the planet of Matar for the Matari. Entering a simulation of the Minmatar’s past, you took part in the Battle of Pator. You fought Imperial occupiers and faced down a supercarrier in a deadly battle. Ultimately, you defeated the Amarr and reclaimed the planet of Matar for the Matari.
1039755 The Minmatar have invited you to experience the Battle of Pator firsthand. Make your way to the simulation site and follow the instructions to experience the liberation of their homeworld. The Minmatar have invited you to experience the Battle of Pator firsthand. Make your way to the simulation site and follow the instructions to experience the liberation of their homeworld.
1039756 Well chosen. Make your way to the simulation site. I will see you there. Well chosen. Make your way to the simulation site. I will see you there.
1039757 Heritage is at the heart of what it means to be Minmatar. Join us in a simulation of the day our Republic was born, the legendary Battle of Pator.

Travel to the simulation site. I will explain more once you arrive.		 Heritage is at the heart of what it means to be Minmatar. Join us in a simulation of the day our Republic was born, the legendary Battle of Pator.

Travel to the simulation site. I will explain more once you arrive.
1039758 Much has changed since that day, but much has not. We are the Matari, and this is our Republic.

If you are ready to continue the fight for liberation, keep an eye out for our campaigns or find our militia offices.		 Much has changed since that day, but much has not. We are the Matari, and this is our Republic.

If you are ready to continue the fight for liberation, keep an eye out for our campaigns or find our militia offices.
1039759 A shame. Matar calls, I hope you will one day see the wisdom of answering. A shame. Matar calls, I hope you will one day see the wisdom of answering.
1039760 Understanding heritage is at the heart of what it means to be Minmatar. Join us in a simulation of the day our Republic was born, the legendary Battle of Pator.

Travel to the simulation site. I will explain more once you arrive.		 Understanding heritage is at the heart of what it means to be Minmatar. Join us in a simulation of the day our Republic was born, the legendary Battle of Pator.

1039761 A shame. Matar calls, I hope you will one day see the wisdom of answering. A shame. Matar calls, I hope you will one day see the wisdom of answering.

The Amarr have invited you to relive their historic battle with the Minmatar at the Golgothan Fields. Travel to the simulation site and follow the instructions to be a part of this historic epic.		 Do you seek re-instruction?

1039764 Board an Amarr tech 1 Destroyer, Frigate, or Corvette.

You will need to fit both an Energy Neutralizer and a Remote Armor Repairer to complete the simulation.		 Board an Amarr tech 1 Destroyer, Frigate, or Corvette.

You will need to fit both an Energy Neutralizer and a Remote Armor Repairer to complete the simulation.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Fitting"
1039765 At the Golgothan Fields in Ennur, the faithful stood their ground against the forces of insurrection, that self-styled “Great Rebellion” of the Minmatar.

Enter the simulation and stand by their side now, know what it is to be counted amongst the righteous.		 At the Golgothan Fields in Ennur, the faithful stood their ground against the forces of insurrection, that self-styled “Great Rebellion” of the Minmatar.

Enter the simulation and stand by their side now, know what it is to be counted amongst the righteous.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Enter - Lobby"
1039766 This is the simulation site. You've already completed it. This is the simulation site. You've already completed it. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Enter - Lobby - Complete"
1039767 Blessings, Captain, I guess you’re my support?

Help me get this Dreadnought repaired so we can join the fray.		 Blessings, Captain, I guess you’re my support?

Help me get this Dreadnought repaired so we can join the fray.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Enter - Default"
1039768 Board a Caldari tech 1 Destroyer, Frigate, or Corvette.

You will need to fit both an ECM and a Remote Shield Booster to complete the simulation.		 Board a Caldari tech 1 Destroyer, Frigate, or Corvette.

You will need to fit both an ECM and a Remote Shield Booster to complete the simulation.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Fitting"
1039769 Captain, ahead you will experience the Caldari’s greatest triumph… and our most bitter loss.

Enter and understand why it is the Caldari State that deserves your loyalty.		 Captain, ahead you will experience the Caldari’s greatest triumph… and our most bitter loss.

Enter and understand why it is the Caldari State that deserves your loyalty.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Enter - Lobby"
1039770 This is the simulation site. You've already completed it. This is the simulation site. You've already completed it. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Enter - Lobby - Complete"
1039771 Caldari Prime, located within the system of Luminaire. Our home.

For the crime of trying to break free from Gallente Federation control, it has suffered devastating bombardment. Now our only hope of survival is to flee.		 Caldari Prime, located within the system of Luminaire. Our home.

For the crime of trying to break free from Gallente Federation control, it has suffered devastating bombardment. Now our only hope of survival is to flee.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Enter - Default"
1039772 Board a Gallente tech 1 Destroyer, Frigate, or Corvette.

You will need to fit a Sensor Dampener to complete the simulation. I'd also recommend you bring some Drones.		 Board a Gallente tech 1 Destroyer, Frigate, or Corvette.

You will need to fit a Sensor Dampener to complete the simulation. I'd also recommend you bring some Drones.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Fitting"
1039773 The Federation is a nation born of many peoples from many planets. We protect their equality, their rights, their freedom.

In the simulation ahead, you will see how we are willing to do whatever it takes to guarantee those freedoms.		 The Federation is a nation born of many peoples from many planets. We protect their equality, their rights, their freedom.

In the simulation ahead, you will see how we are willing to do whatever it takes to guarantee those freedoms.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Enter - Lobby"
1039774 This is the simulation site. You've already completed it. This is the simulation site. You've already completed it. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Enter - Lobby - Complete"
1039775 Intaki Prime is in sight. Occupying forces have the planet surrounded, but they’re not ready to go up against the Gallente when there’s liberation in the air. Intaki Prime is in sight. Occupying forces have the planet surrounded, but they’re not ready to go up against the Gallente when there’s liberation in the air. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Enter - Default"
1039776 Board a Minmatar tech 1 Destroyer, Frigate, or Corvette.

You will need to fit both a Target Painter and a Data Analyzer to complete the simulation.		 Board a Minmatar tech 1 Destroyer, Frigate, or Corvette.

You will need to fit both a Target Painter and a Data Analyzer to complete the simulation.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Fitting"
1039777 This is the simulation site. You've already completed it. This is the simulation site. You've already completed it. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Enter - Lobby - Complete"
1039778 Captain, do you copy? Fleet is in position, hidden in the shadow of Pator IX.

Hack those turrets, and we’ll be able to warp in.		 Captain, do you copy? Fleet is in position, hidden in the shadow of Pator IX.

Hack those turrets, and we’ll be able to warp in.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Enter - Default"
1039779 Hey there, looking for a refresh?

The Gallente have invited you to join them in a simulation of the Liberation of Intaki. Travel to the simulation site and follow the instructions to fight for freedom side by side with the Federation.		 Hey there, looking for a refresh?

The Gallente have invited you to join them in a simulation of the Liberation of Intaki. Travel to the simulation site and follow the instructions to fight for freedom side by side with the Federation.
1039780 We invite you to witness our greatest day, the day on which we took our planet back.

Pass into the simulation, feel the pride of the Matari, and you would be foolish not to embrace our Republic.		 We invite you to witness our greatest day, the day on which we took our planet back.

Pass into the simulation, feel the pride of the Matari, and you would be foolish not to embrace our Republic.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Enter - Lobby"
1039781 You have returned? So be it.

The Caldari have invited you to experience their proudest and darkest day. Make your way to the simulation site and follow the instructions to see what it was like to be a part of the Caldari Breakout.		 You have returned? So be it.

The Caldari have invited you to experience their proudest and darkest day. Make your way to the simulation site and follow the instructions to see what it was like to be a part of the Caldari Breakout.
1039782 Welcome back. Need a reminder?

The Minmatar have invited you to experience the Battle of Pator firsthand. Make your way to the simulation site and follow the instructions to experience the liberation of their homeworld.		 Welcome back. Need a reminder?

The Minmatar have invited you to experience the Battle of Pator firsthand. Make your way to the simulation site and follow the instructions to experience the liberation of their homeworld.

1040215 Operation Rogue Edge Operation Rogue Edge Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Gallente/Title
1040216 Curb the rise of Rogue Drones and unlock new technological frontiers by helping to build the infrastructure necessary to research these dangerous intelligences en masse. Curb the rise of Rogue Drones and unlock new technological frontiers by helping to build the infrastructure necessary to research these dangerous intelligences en masse. Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Gallente/Subtitle
1040217 President Alix Moreau has signed the Rogue Edge executive order, establishing the Federation’s most ambitious research project to date. Its goal: the mastery of Rogue Drone technology.

Our President was elected on a promise to replace ignorance with intelligence. Thanks to their innovative thinking, a new research initiative in partnership with CreoDron aims to harness Rogue advancements for the good of the Federation. If we are successful, new infrastructure not possible with our current technology will become possible, such as faster travel between Intaki and Dodixie.

Success will require military testing, a flood of new data, an efficient industry, and the utmost security. Together, we can build a better future and gain a unique edge over the enemies of freedom.		 President Alix Moreau has signed the Rogue Edge executive order, establishing the Federation’s most ambitious research project to date. Its goal: the mastery of Rogue Drone technology.

Our President was elected on a promise to replace ignorance with intelligence. Thanks to their innovative thinking, a new research initiative in partnership with <a href=showinfo:2//1000101>CreoDron</a> aims to harness Rogue advancements for the good of the <a href=showinfo:30//500004>Federation</a>. If we are successful, new infrastructure not possible with our current technology will become possible, such as faster travel between <a href=showinfo:5//30003788>Intaki</a> and <a href=showinfo:5//30002659>Dodixie</a>.

Success will require military testing, a flood of new data, an efficient industry, and the utmost security. Together, we can build a better future and gain a unique edge over the enemies of freedom.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Gallente/BriefingGoalDescription
1040218 Our President, Alix Moreau, has confirmed it. Thanks to your hard work, Operation Rogue Edge has been a huge success!

Those naysayers who insisted that experimenting with Rogue Drone tech would be a disaster have been put in their place, a new advanced drone has been made available thanks to your efforts. In addition, superior automated infrastructure support has allowed for the construction of even faster transit from our economic heartland to the frontlines.

This is a victory for the Federation and the bold future it promises.		 Our President, Alix Moreau, has confirmed it. Thanks to your hard work, Operation Rogue Edge has been a huge success!

Those naysayers who insisted that experimenting with Rogue Drone tech would be a disaster have been put in their place, a new advanced drone has been made available thanks to your efforts. In addition, superior automated infrastructure support has allowed for the construction of even faster transit from our economic heartland to the frontlines.

This is a victory for the <a href=showinfo:30//500004>Federation</a> and the bold future it promises.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Gallente/CompletionSuccessDescription
1040219 The Senate has voted to cancel Operation Rogue Edge due to insufficient results. This is a sad loss for President Moreau’s flagship policy.

The politicians feel the new shorter transit route to Dodixie was far too expensive for the small infrastructure improvement it represents. To make matters worse, ORE has scooped the drone improvements that we have spent months trying to develop.

But as our President said when she was elected, “every triumph and every failure has been a teacher.” Let us embrace this failure as a teacher and move into the future with greater purpose and insight. Tomorrow is a new day, and it is up to us to seize it for the Federation.		 The Senate has voted to cancel Operation Rogue Edge due to insufficient results. This is a sad loss for President Moreau’s flagship policy.

The politicians feel the new shorter transit route to <a href=showinfo:5//30002659>Dodixie</a> was far too expensive for the small infrastructure improvement it represents. To make matters worse, <a href=showinfo:30//500014>ORE</a> has scooped the drone improvements that we have spent months trying to develop.

But as our President said when she was elected, “every triumph and every failure has been a teacher.” Let us embrace this failure as a teacher and move into the future with greater purpose and insight. Tomorrow is a new day, and it is up to us to seize it for the <a href=showinfo:30//500004>Federation</a>.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Gallente/CompletionFailureDescription

1040277 You made your way to the first in a series of simulations that tells the stories of EVE’s Empires from their own perspective. You made your way to the first in a series of simulations that tells the stories of EVE’s Empires from their own perspective.
1040278 You have been invited to try a series of super-advanced simulations that explore the histories of New Eden’s Empires from their different perspectives. Travel to the first Empire’s embassy system and make contact with their representatives through a holographic messenger You have been invited to try a series of super-advanced simulations that explore the histories of New Eden’s Empires from their different perspectives. Travel to the first Empire’s embassy system and make contact with their representatives through a holographic messenger
1040279 You won’t regret it! Make your way to the first agent and begin your journey into the experience of a lifetime. You won’t regret it! Make your way to the first agent and begin your journey into the experience of a lifetime.
1040280 Make your way to the first agent and begin your journey into these historic simulations. Make your way to the first agent and begin your journey into these historic simulations.
1040281 Good luck, Capsuleer. Good luck, Capsuleer.
1040282 A shame, you don’t know what you are missing out on. Come back and see me when you are ready for an experience like no other. A shame, you don’t know what you are missing out on. Come back and see me when you are ready for an experience like no other.
1040283 Capsuleer, how would you like to time-travel?

No, of course not literally, but with the help of AIR’s new advancements in holographics and coordinated drone actors, you can take a step out of the present and into the epic battles of the past!

Each experience has been crafter in cooperation with the Empire’s top military experts. Yes, perhaps they are more… cinematic, some might even say biased, than historical.. but that is what makes them such an incredible insight into the minds of the Empires!

Accept this offer, visit all four holographic agents and their simulated experiences, and learn the Empire’s truths for yourself!		 Capsuleer, how would you like to time-travel?

No, of course not literally, but with the help of AIR’s new advancements in holographics and coordinated drone actors, you can take a step out of the present and into the epic battles of the past!

Each experience has been crafter in cooperation with the Empire’s top military experts. Yes, perhaps they are more… cinematic, some might even say biased, than historical.. but that is what makes them such an incredible insight into the minds of the Empires!

Accept this offer, visit all four holographic agents and their simulated experiences, and learn the Empire’s truths for yourself!
1040284 A shame, you don’t know what you are missing out on. Come back and see me when you are ready for an experience like no other. A shame, you don’t know what you are missing out on. Come back and see me when you are ready for an experience like no other.

1040288 Hold your faith close as you visit the simulation. Be not tempted by that false idol they call democracy. Hold your faith close as you visit the simulation. Be not tempted by that false idol they call democracy.
1040289 Make your way to the Gallente agent to enter the next simulation. Make your way to the Gallente agent to enter the next simulation.
1040290 Good luck, Capsuleer. Good luck, Capsuleer.
1040291 Are you ready to stop this simulated pilgrimage and embrace the faith? Praise be, yet I would counsel that you go on. Only once you have seen how the heretic thinks can you protect yourself against their lies. Are you ready to stop this simulated pilgrimage and embrace the faith? Praise be, yet I would counsel that you go on. Only once you have seen how the heretic thinks can you protect yourself against their lies.
1040292 Your final simulation will be some hollow entertainment put together by the godless Federation. Go and bear witness to the emptiness of their words, so that you may return to the Empire with a deeper understanding of the power of faith. Your final simulation will be some hollow entertainment put together by the godless Federation. 1040298 Make your way to the Minmatar agent to enter the next simulation. Make your way to the Minmatar agent to enter the next simulation.
1040299 Good luck, Capsuleer. Good luck, Capsuleer.
1040300 You must be so excited to join the State you don’t need to go further. I would advise you to return and complete this journey, understanding an enemy is the only way to defeat them. You must be so excited to join the State you don’t need to go further. I would advise you to return and complete this journey, understanding an enemy is the only way to defeat them.
1040301 You can travel to the next simulation now, and see how well the State stands up by comparison. I believe it is some foolishness made by the tribes of the Minmatar Republic. You can travel to the next simulation now, and see how well the State stands up by comparison. I believe it is some foolishness made by the tribes of the Minmatar Republic.
1040302 You must be so excited to join the State you don’t need to go further. I would advise you to return and complete this journey, understanding an enemy is the only way to defeat them. You must be so excited to join the State you don’t need to go further. I would advise you to return and complete this journey, understanding an enemy is the only way to defeat them.
1040303 Need a refresher? Not a problem.

You have been invited to try a series of super advanced simulations that explore the histories of New Eden’s Empires from their own perspectives. Make your way to the first Empire’s embassy system and make contact with their representatives through a holographic messenger.		 Need a refresher? Not a problem.

You have been invited to try a series of super advanced simulations that explore the histories of New Eden’s Empires from their own perspectives. Make your way to the first Empire’s embassy system and make contact with their representatives through a holographic messenger.
1040304 Are you ready to complete this virtual pilgrimage?

Your final simulation will be some hollow entertainment put together by the godless Federation. Go and bear witness to the emptiness of their words, so that you may return to the Empire with a deeper understanding of the power of faith.		 Are you ready to complete this virtual pilgrimage?

Your final simulation will be some hollow entertainment put together by the godless Federation. Go and bear witness to the emptiness of their words, so that you may return to the Empire with a deeper understanding of the power of faith.
1040305 So, you have chosen knowledge.

You can travel to the next simulation now, and see how well the State stands up by comparison. I believe it is some foolishness made by the tribes of the Minmatar Republic.		 So, you have chosen knowledge.

You can travel to the next simulation now, and see how well the State stands up by comparison. I believe it is some foolishness made by the tribes of the Minmatar Republic.

1040326 A planetary defense platform placed by the occupying Imperial forces. Its primary target is the very planet it has been placed in orbit around. 1040327 Exordium reduced rewards Exordium reduced rewards UI/Agents/StandardMission/SecurityTaxMessage
1040329 AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Fighter Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE) AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Fighter Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE) Name of item 93310 (Cloud)
1040333 AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Battleship Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE) AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Battleship Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE) Name of item 93311 (Cloud)
1040334 Rebellion Maelstrom Rebellion Maelstrom Name of item 93312 (Irregular Battleship)
1040335 A frontline combatant in the war for Minmatar liberation, this Maelstron-class battleship will not quit until Matar is free of Imperial control. A frontline combatant in the war for Minmatar liberation, this Maelstron-class battleship will not quit until Matar is free of Imperial control. Description of item "Rebellion Maelstrom" (93312)
1040338 Imperial Fighter Imperial Fighter Name of item 93313 (Irregular Fighter)
1040339 A Templar-class fighter sworn to protect their Lord Governor and his Aeon supercarrier. A Templar-class fighter sworn to protect their Lord Governor and his Aeon supercarrier. Description of item "Imperial Fighter" (93313)
1040340 Governor Aeon Governor Aeon Name of item 93314 (Irregular Super Carrier)
1040341 An Aeon-class supercarrier under the command of the Imperial Lord Governor Juliano Corvinos. In his tenure overseeing the occupation of Matar, this villainous figure has administered countless horrors on the native people. An Aeon-class supercarrier under the command of the Imperial Lord Governor Juliano Corvinos. In his tenure overseeing the occupation of Matar, this villainous figure has administered countless horrors on the native people. Description of item "Governor Aeon" (93314)
1040342 Your hollow prayers won’t silence the call of our ancestors.

Take out that supercarrier’s fighters so our battleships can finish it off.		 Your hollow prayers won’t silence the call of our ancestors.

Take out that supercarrier’s fighters so our battleships can finish it off.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Event - Destroy Fighters"
1040343 Captain, assist in the supercarrier’s take down.

Using a target painter on the target will help the battleships do their damage.		 Captain, assist in the supercarrier’s take down.

Using a target painter on the target will help the battleships do their damage.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Event - Target Paint"

1040917 New gates are constructed between Renyn and Jufvitte, shortening the route between Intaki and Dodixie to 6 jumps where all the systems on this planned new path belong to the Federation.

A new low-waste variant of the Excavator drone is developed and made available in the Federation Navy Loyalty Point Stores.		 New gates are constructed between <a href=showinfo:5//30004970>Renyn</a> and <a href=showinfo:5//30005308>Jufvitte</a>, shortening the route between Intaki and Dodixie to 6 jumps where all the systems on this planned new path belong to the Federation.

A new low-waste variant of the Excavator drone is developed and made available in the <a href=showinfo:2//1000120>Federation Navy</a> Loyalty Point Stores.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Gallente/BriefingSuccessDescription
1040918 Only able to construct gates between Renyn and Ellmay, reducing the distance between Intaki and Dodixie to 9 jumps while still keeping the new route fully in the Federation territory.

ORE beats the Federation to developing the new low-waste variant of the Excavator drone, making it available via ORE Loyalty Point Stores.		 Only able to construct gates between Renyn and <a href=showinfo:5//30005313>Ellmay</a>, reducing the distance between Intaki and Dodixie to 9 jumps while still keeping the new route fully in the Federation territory.

<a href=showinfo:30//500014>ORE</a> beats the Federation to developing the new low-waste variant of the Excavator drone, making it available via ORE Loyalty Point Stores.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Gallente/BriefingFailureDescription
1040926 The Blessed Exchange The Blessed Exchange Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Amarr/Title
1040927 Bring glory to the Amarrian economy and elevate the Emperor Family Academy station in Amarr to a true home of sanctified commerce. Make it a shining light of holy prosperity envied throughout the cluster. Bring glory to the Amarrian economy and elevate the <a href=showinfo:1932//60008494>Emperor Family Academy station in Amarr</a> to a true home of sanctified commerce. Make it a shining light of holy prosperity envied throughout the cluster. Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Amarr/Subtitle
1040928 Our Holy Empress Catiz I has tasked us with bringing glory to the material lives of those who have dedicated their spirits to the Lord. It is our task to elevate the economic power of the Amarr by building a most Blessed Exchange.

Our Empire requires the security of gold. Jita, that pit of profane greed, has slipped through the Caldari’s clutches. As they falter, we shall rise. The Emperor Family Academy in Amarr has long been the center of trade within the Empire. We will construct a specialist Deaconry to oversee a new dawn of economic improvement.

All ye faithful must clear the way for this glorious work. Cast out the heretics, put our enemies to flame, explore every corner of creation, build a magnificent industry, and become our Empress' will manifest.		 Our Holy Empress Catiz I has tasked us with bringing glory to the material lives of those who have dedicated their spirits to the Lord. It is our task to elevate the economic power of the Amarr by building a most Blessed Exchange.

Our Empire requires the security of gold. <a href=showinfo:5//30000142>Jita</a>, that pit of profane greed, has slipped through the Caldari’s clutches. As they falter, we shall rise. The <a href=showinfo:1932//60008494>Emperor Family Academy in Amarr</a> has long been the center of trade within the Empire. We will construct a specialist Deaconry to oversee a new dawn of economic improvement.

All ye faithful must clear the way for this glorious work. Cast out the heretics, put our enemies to flame, explore every corner of creation, build a magnificent industry, and become our Empress' will manifest.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Amarr/BriefingGoalDescription
1040929 Establish the Deaconry of Economic Oversight around the Amarr VIII (Oris) - Emperor Family Academy station.

6 month 50% reduction in Taxes & Broker Fees inside Amarr VIII (Oris) - Emperor Family Academy station.		 Establish the Deaconry of Economic Oversight around the <a href=showinfo:1932//60008494>Amarr VIII (Oris) - Emperor Family Academy</a> station.

6 month 50% reduction in Taxes & Broker Fees inside Amarr VIII (Oris) - Emperor Family Academy station.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Amarr/BriefingSuccessDescription
1040930 Incomplete Deaconry of Economic Oversight around the Amarr VIII (Oris) - Emperor Family Academy station.

3 month 50% reduction in Taxes & Broker Fees inside Amarr VIII (Oris) - Emperor Family Academy station.		 Incomplete Deaconry of Economic Oversight around the <a href=showinfo:1932//60008494>Amarr VIII (Oris) - Emperor Family Academy</a> station.

3 month 50% reduction in Taxes & Broker Fees inside Amarr VIII (Oris) - Emperor Family Academy station.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Amarr/BriefingFailureDescription
1040931 Bask in the might of the faithful, and the manifest glory of our Lord’s intent. The Deaconry of Economic Oversight will ensure glory is brought to our Blessed Exchange, bringing prosperity to the chosen.

In her great wisdom, the Empress Catiz I has granted a reprieve on taxation to all who trade within the Amarr VIII (Oris) - Emperor Family Academy station.

Take to your ships and make the pilgrimage home to the system of Amarr. Partake in holy commerce and bask in the majesty of our Lord’s bounty.		 Bask in the might of the faithful, and the manifest glory of our Lord’s intent. The Deaconry of Economic Oversight will ensure glory is brought to our Blessed Exchange, bringing prosperity to the chosen.

In her great wisdom, the Empress Catiz I has granted a reprieve on taxation to all who trade within the <a href=showinfo:1932//60008494>Amarr VIII (Oris) - Emperor Family Academy</a> station.

Take to your ships and make the pilgrimage home to the system of <a href=showinfo:5//30002187>Amarr</a>. Partake in holy commerce and bask in the majesty of our Lord’s bounty.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Amarr/CompletionSuccessDescription
1040932 Winter falls, and our faith must weather its coming.

Our labors have not been enough to secure the prosperity our Empress deserves. In Amarr, the Deaconry lies incomplete, a testament to our shame.

To alleviate the pressure placed on our industries by this endeavor, our merciful Empress has authorized a short-term reduction in taxation within the Amarr VIII (Oris) - Emperor Family Academy.

These challenging times are a test placed before us by the Lord. From winter will come spring, and it is in the darkest nights that our light must shine the brightest. Smite our enemies, build back our industry, and hold true to the heavenly promise of Amarr.		 Winter falls, and our faith must weather its coming.

Our labors have not been enough to secure the prosperity our Empress deserves. In <a href=showinfo:5//30002187>Amarr</a>, the Deaconry lies incomplete, a testament to our shame.

To alleviate the pressure placed on our industries by this endeavor, our merciful Empress has authorized a short-term reduction in taxation within the <a href=showinfo:1932//60008494>Amarr VIII (Oris) - Emperor Family Academy</a>.

These challenging times are a test placed before us by the Lord. From winter will come spring, and it is in the darkest nights that our light must shine the brightest. Smite our enemies, build back our industry, and hold true to the heavenly promise of Amarr.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Amarr/CompletionFailureDescription
1040933 State Corridor Initiative State Corridor Initiative Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Caldari/Title
1040934 Secure strategic control over the Syndicate region to both enable the construction of a direct stargate connection to the Caldari warzone and crush the treacherous Intaki Syndicate. Secure strategic control over the <a href=showinfo:3//10000041>Syndicate</a> region to both enable the construction of a direct stargate connection to the Caldari warzone and crush the treacherous <a href=showinfo:30//500009>Intaki Syndicate</a>. Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Caldari/Subtitle
1040935 Nothing will stand in the way of the Caldari State when it goes to war. The Chief Executive Panel has mandated that all who are loyal to Caldari must aid in cutting a path through Syndicate so that resources can be delivered directly to the war zone.

Total control over the Syndicate region is the only way to guarantee a reliable path for State Forces. The claws of the criminal Intaki Syndicate are still buried in the region they once claimed. Their dishonor can only be met with discipline; the time has come to bring the last of the treacherous Syndicate to heel.

To all who hear this, it is your duty to do whatever is needed to complete this great endeavor. Harvest, build, explore, and destroy those who stand against us. You shall not accept failure, and neither shall the State.		 Nothing will stand in the way of the <a href=showinfo:30//500001>Caldari State</a> when it goes to war. The Chief Executive Panel has mandated that all who are loyal to Caldari must aid in cutting a path through <a href=showinfo:3//10000041>Syndicate</a> so that resources can be delivered directly to the war zone.

Total control over the Syndicate region is the only way to guarantee a reliable path for State Forces. The claws of the criminal <a href=showinfo:30//500009>Intaki Syndicate</a> are still buried in the region they once claimed. Their dishonor can only be met with discipline; the time has come to bring the last of the treacherous Syndicate to heel.

To all who hear this, it is your duty to do whatever is needed to complete this great endeavor. Harvest, build, explore, and destroy those who stand against us. You shall not accept failure, and neither shall the State.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Caldari/BriefingGoalDescription
1040936 New Stargates are constructed linking Ienakkamon to T-LIWS

The Intaki Syndicate is dissolved, and its member corporations are absorbed into the Caldari State.

Intaki Syndicate LP offers become available in the State Protectorate Loyalty Point Store.		 New Stargates are constructed linking <a href=showinfo:5//30045313>Ienakkamon</a> to <a href=showinfo:5//30003299>T-LIWS</a>

The Intaki Syndicate is dissolved, and its member corporations are absorbed into the Caldari State.

Intaki Syndicate LP offers become available in the <a href=showinfo:2//1000180>State Protectorate</a> Loyalty Point Store.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Caldari/BriefingSuccessDescription
1040937 New Stargates in Ienakkamon and T-LIWS remain incomplete.

The Intaki Syndicate seeks refuge, and its member corporations are absorbed into the Gallente Federation.

Intaki Syndicate LP offers become available in the Federal Defense Union Loyalty Point Store.		 New Stargates in Ienakkamon and T-LIWS remain incomplete.

The Intaki Syndicate seeks refuge, and its member corporations are absorbed into the <a href=showinfo:30//500004>Gallente Federation</a>.

Intaki Syndicate LP offers become available in the <a href=showinfo:2//1000181>Federal Defense Union</a> Loyalty Point Store.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Caldari/BriefingFailureDescription
1040938 The corridor has opened, and through it the strength of the Caldari flows.

Those loyal to the State have delivered a mastery over Syndicate and broken the organization that once rivaled us for control. Their institutions have sworn loyalty to the State and their criminal past is at an end.

This region remains a dangerous place, but face that danger knowing that you have brought honor to your megacorporations and your State.		 The corridor has opened, and through it the strength of the Caldari flows.

Those loyal to the State have delivered a mastery over <a href=showinfo:3//10000041>Syndicate</a> and broken the organization that once rivaled us for control. Their institutions have sworn loyalty to the State and their criminal past is at an end.

This region remains a dangerous place, but face that danger knowing that you have brought honor to your megacorporations and your State.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Caldari/CompletionSuccessDescription
1040939 This outcome is… unacceptable. Syndicate remains too wild for our corridor project to be completed.

The treacherous Intaki Syndicate has found refuge in the arms of the Federation. Now our greatest enemy has wormed their way into a region that is rightfully ours. Do not suffer this dishonor; wipe it clean with a hail of railgun fire.

The Federation's latest lapdogs will not stand against unbreakable Caldari resolve. Carry out your duty with honor; defeat only comes to those who surrender.		 This outcome is… unacceptable. <a href=showinfo:3//10000041>Syndicate</a> remains too wild for our corridor project to be completed.

The treacherous <a href=showinfo:30//500009>Intaki Syndicate</a> has found refuge in the arms of the <a href=showinfo:30//500004>Federation</a>. Now our greatest enemy has wormed their way into a region that is rightfully ours. Do not suffer this dishonor; wipe it clean with a hail of railgun fire.

The Federation's latest lapdogs will not stand against unbreakable Caldari resolve. Carry out your duty with honor; defeat only comes to those who surrender.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Caldari/CompletionFailureDescription
1040940 Starkmanir Restoration Starkmanir Restoration Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Minmatar/Title
1040941 Restore the Starkmanir to their historic worlds and boost the Republic’s Industry in the process. Reclaim Arzad and Ezzara for the Republic, returning Arzad II to its true title, Starkman Prime. Restore the <a href=showinfo:2//1000412>Starkmanir</a> to their historic worlds and boost the Republic’s Industry in the process. Reclaim <a href=showinfo:5//30002960>Arzad</a> and <a href=showinfo:5//30002962>Ezzara</a> for the Republic, returning <a href=showinfo:2016//40187877>Arzad II</a> to its true title, Starkman Prime. Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Minmatar/Subtitle
1040942 Before the Darkest Day, our ancestors took to the stars.

The Starkmanir Tribe was so dedicated to our future that they built a new home on a distant planet. The Amarr tried to take that future, and when the Starkmanir resisted, the Empire all but destroyed them.

For centuries, this crime has been allowed to stand, but no longer. The time has come to restore the Starkmanir and bring about a new age of prosperity for the Republic. If restored, their ancient knowledge could be the key to understanding the changing astral topography of New Eden.

Hackers, engineers, guardians, and soldiers, the tribes of Matar call on you. Together, we shall take back our lands, erase the lie that is Arzad II, and reinstate Starkman Prime. Let the new dawn of the Starkmanir light our way to glory.		 Before the Darkest Day, our ancestors took to the stars.

The <a href=showinfo:2//1000412>Starkmanir Tribe</a> was so dedicated to our future that they built a new home on a distant planet. The <a href=showinfo:30//500003>Amarr</a> tried to take that future, and when the Starkmanir resisted, the Empire all but destroyed them.

For centuries, this crime has been allowed to stand, but no longer. The time has come to restore the Starkmanir and bring about a new age of prosperity for the <a href=showinfo:30//500002>Republic</a>. If restored, their ancient knowledge could be the key to understanding the changing astral topography of New Eden.

Hackers, engineers, guardians, and soldiers, the tribes of Matar call on you. Together, we shall take back our lands, erase the lie that is <a href=showinfo:2016//40187877>Arzad II</a>, and reinstate Starkman Prime. Let the new dawn of the Starkmanir light our way to glory.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Minmatar/BriefingGoalDescription
1040943 Rename Arzad II to Starkman Prime. The sovereignty of the Arzad and Ezzara systems will change from Amarr to Minmatar.

A new Starkmanir Tribe station is constructed in Arzad.

The Starkmanir uncover new Phased Fields in Minmatar high-security space.		 Rename Arzad II to Starkman Prime. The sovereignty of the <a href=showinfo:5//30002960>Arzad</a> and <a href=showinfo:5//30002962>Ezzara</a> systems will change from Amarr to Minmatar.

A new Starkmanir Tribe station is constructed in Arzad.

The Starkmanir uncover new <a href="localsvc:contentGroupID=87&method=AgencyOpenAndShow">Phased Fields</a> in Minmatar high-security space.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Minmatar/BriefingSuccessDescription
1040944 The Amarr build a landmark to their control in Arzad. The Amarr build a landmark to their control in Arzad. Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Minmatar/BriefingFailureDescription
1040945 I speak to you from the surface of Starkman Prime. This once lush world still bears the scars of the terrible crimes committed by its former occupiers.

Yet, from beneath that rubble, Starkmanir archaeologists are retrieving long-lost information about New Eden. Information on how not just how this planet has changed, but how the stars and the spacetime itself around New Eden have shifted over the centuries.

An age of discovery lies before us, built on ancient foundations. Be proud, children of Matar. No matter your tribe, this is our legacy, our new beginning.		 I speak to you from the surface of Starkman Prime. This once lush world still bears the scars of the terrible crimes committed by its former occupiers.

Yet, from beneath that rubble, <a href=showinfo:2//1000412>Starkmanir</a> archaeologists are retrieving long-lost information about New Eden. Information on how not just how this planet has changed, but how the stars and the spacetime itself around New Eden have shifted over the centuries.

An age of discovery lies before us, built on ancient foundations. Be proud, children of Matar. No matter your tribe, this is our legacy, our new beginning.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Minmatar/CompletionSuccessDescription
1040946 Our past and the truths it may hold remain shrouded in darkness. We mourn, Starkman Prime has been lost anew.

The Amarr have constructed a monument to our failures. They are foolish if they believe this mockery will cause the Tribes of Matar to lose heart. Look past the lie that is Arzad II. The legacy of the Starkmanir lives on in us all, and no Empire can ever conquer our spirits.		 Our past and the truths it may hold remain shrouded in darkness. We mourn, Starkman Prime has been lost anew.

The <a href=showinfo:30//500003>Amarr</a> have constructed a monument to our failures. They are foolish if they believe this mockery will cause the Tribes of Matar to lose heart. Look past the lie that is <a href=showinfo:2016//40187877>Arzad II</a>. The legacy of the <a href=showinfo:2//1000412>Starkmanir</a> lives on in us all, and no Empire can ever conquer our spirits.		 Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Minmatar/CompletionFailureDescription

1041168 Imperial Benediction - Unlimited Imperial Benediction - Unlimited Name of item 93466 (Ship SKIN Design Element)
1041169 A license for the unlimited use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide Alignment Sequencer to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.		 A license for the unlimited use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide <a href=showinfo:81348>Alignment Sequencer</a> to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.		 Description of item "Imperial Benediction - Unlimited" (93466)

1041707 Bulwarks Bulwarks Campaigns/GeneralAnnotations/MapScreenSectionTitleBulwarks
1041708 Bulwark systems are high-security strategic support systems bordering the warzone. While not sites of direct conflict, they offer opportunities to support campaigns and advance your faction’s progress towards victory. Bulwark systems are <b>high-security</b> strategic support systems bordering the warzone. While not sites of direct conflict, they offer opportunities to support campaigns and advance your faction’s progress towards victory. Campaigns/GeneralAnnotations/MapScreenSectionParagraphBulwarks
1041709 The Warzone The Warzone Campaigns/GeneralAnnotations/MapScreenSectionTitleWarzone
1041710 Warzones are active zones of conflict in which capsuleer fights capsuleer and factions clash for control. Campaign activities and Factional Warfare shape the ongoing wars. Warzones are active zones of conflict in which capsuleer fights capsuleer and factions <b>clash for control</b>. Campaign activities and <a href="localsvc:contentGroupID=35&method=AgencyOpenAndShow">Factional Warfare</a> shape the ongoing wars. Campaigns/GeneralAnnotations/MapScreenSectionParagraphWarzone

1041716 Renyn, Jufvitte, and Ellmay all lie between the Federal Defense Union’s HQ in Intaki and the market system of Dodixie. Which of these systems becomes linked will determine how greatly that route is improved. <a href=showinfo:5//30004970>Renyn</a>, <a href=showinfo:5//30005308>Jufvitte</a>, and <a href=showinfo:5//30005313>Ellmay</a> all lie between the <a href=showinfo:2//1000181>Federal Defense Union’s</a> HQ in <a href=showinfo:5//30003788>Intaki</a> and the market system of <a href=showinfo:5//30002659>Dodixie</a>. Which of these systems becomes linked will determine how greatly that route is improved. Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Gallente/MapScreenSection1Paragraph

1041732 The capital system of the Amarr Empire. It is the birthplace of their faith and the heart of the Empire’s economy. It is here that the benefits of this campaign’s success will be felt most. The capital system of the Amarr Empire. It is the birthplace of their faith and the heart of the Empire’s economy. It is here that the benefits of this campaign’s success will be felt most. 1041733 Honor, duty, loyalty, and retribution. Honor, duty, loyalty, and retribution. Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Caldari/BriefingFinalWords

1041735 The State Corridor The State Corridor Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Caldari/MapScreenSection1Title
1041736 Ienakkamon is a system in the Caldari-Gallente Warzone and T-LIWS is a system in the Caldari-controlled null-security region of Syndicate. It is these two systems that will be linked by the new stargate corridor. <a href=showinfo:5//30045313>Ienakkamon</a> is a system in the Caldari-Gallente Warzone and <a href=showinfo:5//30003299>T-LIWS</a> is a system in the Caldari-controlled null-security region of <a href=showinfo:3//10000041>Syndicate</a>. It is these two systems that will be linked by the new stargate corridor. Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Caldari/MapScreenSection1Paragraph
1041737 We are Matari, and this is our right. We are Matari, and this is our right. Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Minmatar/BriefingFinalWords
1041738 Historical Starkmanir Systems, Bulwarks, and the Warzone. Historical Starkmanir Systems, Bulwarks, and the Warzone. Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Minmatar/MapScreenSubheader
1041741 Historical Starkmanir Systems Historical Starkmanir Systems Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Minmatar/MapScreenSection1Title
1041742 The systems of Arzad and Ezzara were first settled by the Starkmanir in ancient times, but were conquered by the Amarr. If this campaign is successful, they will be restored to their rightful people. The systems of <a href=showinfo:5//30002960>Arzad</a> and <a href=showinfo:5//30002962>Ezzara</a> were first settled by the <a href=showinfo:2//1000412>Starkmanir</a> in ancient times, but were conquered by the <a href=showinfo:30//500003>Amarr</a>. If this campaign is successful, they will be restored to their rightful people. Campaigns/2026_Q2/CampaignData/Minmatar/MapScreenSection1Paragraph

1041757 Campaign Objective Reward Campaign Objective Reward
1041778 Imperial War Reserves Supply Package Imperial War Reserves Supply Package Name of item 93609 (Miscellaneous)
1041779 A supply package that was procured and manufactured by the Imperial War Reserves corporation. Intended to deliver crucial military supplies to the Amarr Empire on the frontlines.

The Minmatar Republic will reward capsuleers who intercept these supply packages and bring them to Tribal Liberation Force stations in their loyalty point store.		 A supply package that was procured and manufactured by the Imperial War Reserves corporation. Intended to deliver crucial military supplies to the Amarr Empire on the frontlines.

The Minmatar Republic will reward capsuleers who intercept these supply packages and bring them to Tribal Liberation Force stations in their loyalty point store.		 Description of item "Imperial War Reserves Supply Package" (93609)
1041780 State Military Stockpile Supply Package State Military Stockpile Supply Package Name of item 93610 (Miscellaneous)
1041781 A supply package that was procured and manufactured by the State Military Stockpile corporation. Intended to deliver crucial military supplies to the Caldari State on the frontlines.

The Gallente Federation will reward capsuleers who intercept these supply packages and bring them to Federal Defense Union stations in their loyalty point store.		 A supply package that was procured and manufactured by the State Military Stockpile corporation. Intended to deliver crucial military supplies to the Caldari State on the frontlines.

The Gallente Federation will reward capsuleers who intercept these supply packages and bring them to Federal Defense Union stations in their loyalty point store.		 Description of item "State Military Stockpile Supply Package" (93610)
1041782 Federal Strategic Materiel Supply Package Federal Strategic Materiel Supply Package Name of item 93611 (Miscellaneous)
1041783 A supply package that was procured and manufactured by the Federal Strategic Materiel corporation. Intended to deliver crucial military supplies to the Gallente Federation on the frontlines.

The Caldari State will reward capsuleers who intercept these supply packages and bring them to State Protectorate stations in their loyalty point store.		 A supply package that was procured and manufactured by the Federal Strategic Materiel corporation. Intended to deliver crucial military supplies to the Gallente Federation on the frontlines.

The Caldari State will reward capsuleers who intercept these supply packages and bring them to State Protectorate stations in their loyalty point store.		 Description of item "Federal Strategic Materiel Supply Package" (93611)
1041784 Republic Fleet Ordnance Supply Package Republic Fleet Ordnance Supply Package Name of item 93612 (Miscellaneous)
1041785 A supply package that was procured and manufactured by the Republic Fleet Ordnance corporation. Intended to deliver crucial military supplies to the Minmatar Republic on the frontlines.

The Amarr Empire will reward capsuleers who intercept these supply packages and bring them to 24th Imperial Crusade stations in their loyalty point store.		 A supply package that was procured and manufactured by the Republic Fleet Ordnance corporation. Intended to deliver crucial military supplies to the Minmatar Republic on the frontlines.

The Amarr Empire will reward capsuleers who intercept these supply packages and bring them to 24th Imperial Crusade stations in their loyalty point store.		 Description of item "Republic Fleet Ordnance Supply Package" (93612)
