1041853 Many sacrificed themselves that day, but in the end, the battle was won.

The Minmatar rebellion would go on, but it is but a thorn in the side of our vast and glorious empire.		 Many sacrificed themselves that day, but in the end, the battle was won.

The Minmatar rebellion would go on, but it is but a thorn in the side of our vast and glorious empire.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Event - Complete"
1041854 From those humble origins, we built the mighty Caldari State. Though we lost our home that day, we vowed to one day return and take back all that was ours. From those humble origins, we built the mighty Caldari State. Though we lost our home that day, we vowed to one day return and take back all that was ours. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Event - Complete"
1041855 We may come from different worlds, but we are one Gallente, and we will bring freedo We may come from different worlds, but we are one Gallente, and we will bring freedo Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Event - Complete"
1041856 That day changed everything. There would be other battles fought, but after the liberation of Matar, our rebellion could not be stopped.

Yet still today, not all our people are free, and our war of liberation wages on.		 That day changed everything. There would be other battles fought, but after the liberation of Matar, our rebellion could not be stopped.

Yet still today, not all our people are free, and our war of liberation wages on.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Event - Complete"

1041884 The fleet is diverting to you. We’re back on the advance across all fronts! The fleet is diverting to you. We’re back on the advance across all fronts! Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Event - Target Painted"
1041889 All transports entering warp. Incredible work. All transports entering warp. Incredible work. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Civilians Escaped - All"
1041890 The full force of the Gallente fleet is on us!

Protect the megacorp transports, destroy the invaders. Surrender is not an option.		 The full force of the Gallente fleet is on us!

Protect the megacorp transports, destroy the invaders. Surrender is not an option.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Event - Protect Civilains"
1041891 Use the time I have bought you well. Protect each other, destroy every Federation lakey, carve a path to our future. Use the time I have bought you well. Protect each other, destroy every Federation lakey, carve a path to our future. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Event - Destroy Hostiles"
1041892 Glorious, practically good as new.

And within this flame, the Lord found faith renewed.

So sayeth Gheinok the First 1:3.

Follow me, Captain, we’re heading into the belly of this rebellious beast.		 Glorious, practically good as new.

And within this flame, the Lord found faith renewed.

So sayeth Gheinok the First 1:3.

1041893 Time to bring righteous flame to these unbelievers!

Destroy all hostiles that come our way, let us show them the might of the Lord!		 Time to bring righteous flame to these unbelievers!

Destroy all hostiles that come our way, let us show them the might of the Lord!		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Event - Destroy Hostiles"

We’ve cleared out this wing, searching for our next target.		 Swift justice delivered! Excellent work, Captain

1041899 I must prepare the final assault.

I need you to head in first, neutralize their vessels to weaken their shields.		 I must prepare the final assault.

1041900 This is the free people of Intaki, ready to fight alongside the Federation!

The Caldari are filling their haulers with our priceless cultural artifacts. We are pinned down by their ground troops and are helpless to stop them.

Please, stop those Megacorporation Haulers before they escape!		 This is the free people of Intaki, ready to fight alongside the Federation!

The Caldari are filling their haulers with our priceless cultural artifacts. We are pinned down by their ground troops and are helpless to stop them.

Please, stop those Megacorporation Haulers before they escape!		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Event - Destroy Haulers"
1041901 Our Erebus-class titan vessel is en route.

Sensor dampen those cannons to protect its approach.		 Our Erebus-class titan vessel is en route.

1041911 Acceleration Gate Acceleration Gate Name of item 93650 (Warp Gate)
1041912 Acceleration gate technology reaches far back to the expansion era of the empires that survived the great EVE gate collapse. While their individual setup might differ in terms of ship size they can transport and whether they require a certain passkey or code to be used, all share the same fundamental function of hurling space vessels to a destination beacon within solar system boundaries. ( copy ) Acceleration gate technology reaches far back to the expansion era of the empires that survived the great EVE gate collapse. While their individual setup might differ in terms of ship size they can transport and whether they require a certain passkey or code to be used, all share the same fundamental function of hurling space vessels to a destination beacon within solar system boundaries. ( copy ) Description of item "Acceleration Gate" (93650)

1042106 This SKIN marks the 23rd anniversary of the rise of the capsuleers by honoring the system they turned into the economic heart of New Eden. In YC128, Jita finds itself at the heart of the Warpath conflict. Carry its star with pride as a reminder of the power for change all capsuleers wield. 1042278 A license for the single use of a metallic nanocoating in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this nanocoating has been bound, and though it can only be used once no sequence binders are required when it is consumed in the sequencing of a SKIN license. 1043060 The old smuggling route gates were built by a coalition of Minmatar rebels and various pirate factions as a means to travel quickly and discreetly between the outer regions of space. They are favored by many to whom Empire Space is too high-profile and wish to keep a good distance from the vigilant fleet commanders of CONCORD. The old smuggling route gates were built by a coalition of Minmatar rebels and various pirate factions as a means to travel quickly and discreetly between the outer regions of space. They are favored by many to whom Empire Space is too high-profile and wish to keep a good distance from the vigilant fleet commanders of CONCORD. 1043093 'Aergia' Hobgoblin SW-300 'Aergia' Hobgoblin SW-300 Name of item 93963 (Stasis Webifying Drone)
1043094 Light Webifier Drone

Because of the instability inherent in affixing large, ship-capable webifier equipment to a small, mobile, independently powered carrier such as a mobile drone, the manufacturer had to sacrifice certain aspects of the drone's infrastructure. As a result, the drone has a high signature radius, making it relatively easy to target and hit, and isn't sturdy enough to suffer more than a few blows to its carapace.		 Light Webifier Drone

Because of the instability inherent in affixing large, ship-capable webifier equipment to a small, mobile, independently powered carrier such as a mobile drone, the manufacturer had to sacrifice certain aspects of the drone's infrastructure. As a result, the drone has a high signature radius, making it relatively easy to target and hit, and isn't sturdy enough to suffer more than a few blows to its carapace.		 Description of item "'Aergia' Hobgoblin SW-300" (93963)

1043328 Federation Navy 'Argyreos' Magnetic Field Stabilizer Federation Navy 'Argyreos' Magnetic Field Stabilizer Name of item 93998 (Magnetic Field Stabilizer)
1043329 The Federation Navy 'Argyreos' Magnetic Field Stabilizer is a special modification of the standard Magnetic Field Stabilizer to include command, control and communications firmware that will enhance drones alongside hybrid turrets.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.		 The Federation Navy 'Argyreos' Magnetic Field Stabilizer is a special modification of the standard Magnetic Field Stabilizer to include command, control and communications firmware that will enhance drones alongside hybrid turrets.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.		 Description of item "Federation Navy 'Argyreos' Magnetic Field Stabilizer" (93998)
1043413 Cannot enter Exordium with Criminal or Suspect Timers. Cannot enter Exordium with Criminal or Suspect Timers. UI/Safespace/CantEnterExordiumWhileFlagged
1043414 Republic Interstellar Shipcaster ( copy ) Republic Interstellar Shipcaster ( copy )
1043415 This Republic Interstellar Shipcaster is the result of the Minmatar Republic’s efforts to develop Triglavian transport relay technology into a working strategic asset in the Amarr-Minmatar militia warzone. Positioned in the Republic theater HQ system of Amo, this Interstellar Shipcaster is capable of linking to up to three Republic Shipcaster Beacons anywhere in the warzone, and sending Minmatar forces, including Tribal Liberation Force militia warriors, to the designated locations.

Constructed by the Minmatar Republic after a dedicated campaign by Republican loyalist capsuleers to the acquire and develop Triglavian transport relay technology, matching its already mature stellar technology development, the Republic Interstellar Shipcaster is the transport hub of a Shipcaster network powered by a Republic Stellar Transmuter.

Interacting with this Republic Interstellar Shipcaster will permit capsuleers aligned to the Minmatar Republic to select one of the destinations beacons currently linked as a travel destination. The Interstellar Shipcaster charges for transport to each beacon in turn before becoming active for launch of capsuleers to a destination. Interstellar Shipcaster travel is a long-range but one-way method of transport. ( copy )		 This Republic Interstellar Shipcaster is the result of the Minmatar Republic’s efforts to develop Triglavian transport relay technology into a working strategic asset in the Amarr-Minmatar militia warzone. Positioned in the Republic theater HQ system of Amo, this Interstellar Shipcaster is capable of linking to up to three Republic Shipcaster Beacons anywhere in the warzone, and sending Minmatar forces, including Tribal Liberation Force militia warriors, to the designated locations.

Constructed by the Minmatar Republic after a dedicated campaign by Republican loyalist capsuleers to the acquire and develop Triglavian transport relay technology, matching its already mature stellar technology development, the Republic Interstellar Shipcaster is the transport hub of a Shipcaster network powered by a Republic Stellar Transmuter.

Interacting with this Republic Interstellar Shipcaster will permit capsuleers aligned to the Minmatar Republic to select one of the destinations beacons currently linked as a travel destination. The Interstellar Shipcaster charges for transport to each beacon in turn before becoming active for launch of capsuleers to a destination. Interstellar Shipcaster travel is a long-range but one-way method of transport. ( copy )

1043527 Gallente Occupied Stargate Gallente Occupied Stargate Name of item 94028 (Large Collidable Structure)
1043528 The old smuggling route gates were built by a coalition of Minmatar rebels and various pirate factions as a means to travel quickly and discreetly between the outer regions of space. They are favored by many to whom Empire Space is too high-profile and wish to keep a good distance from the vigilant fleet commanders of CONCORD. The old smuggling route gates were built by a coalition of Minmatar rebels and various pirate factions as a means to travel quickly and discreetly between the outer regions of space. They are favored by many to whom Empire Space is too high-profile and wish to keep a good distance from the vigilant fleet commanders of CONCORD. Description of item "Gallente Occupied Stargate" (94028)

1043533 Asteroid Set 1 Large 3 Scordite Asteroid Set 1 Large 3 Scordite Name of item 94031 (Non-Interactable Object)
1043535 As the Warpth Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire. As the Warpath Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. 1043689 Set as default SKIN Set as default SKIN UI/Skins/SetDefault
1043696 Remove as default SKIN Remove as default SKIN UI/Skins/RemoveDefault
1043698 As the Warpth Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire. As the Warpath Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire. As the Warpath Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire. Description of item "Pontifex Mandate of Faith SKIN" (94054)

1043719 Imperial Navy 'Neophyte' Heat Sink Imperial Navy 'Neophyte' Heat Sink Name of item 94058 (Heat Sink)
1043720 The Imperial Navy 'Neophyte' Heat Sink is a special modification of the standard Heat Sink to include command, control and communications firmware that will enhance drones alongside energy turrets.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.		 The Imperial Navy 'Neophyte' Heat Sink is a special modification of the standard Heat Sink to include command, control and communications firmware that will enhance drones alongside energy turrets.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.		 Description of item "Imperial Navy 'Neophyte' Heat Sink" (94058)

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized. 1043735 Caldari Navy Missile Guidance Computer Caldari Navy Missile Guidance Computer Name of item 94063 (Missile Guidance Computer)
1043736 By predicting the trajectory of targets, it helps to boost the precision and range of missiles. This module can be loaded with scripts to increase its effectiveness in certain areas.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.		 By predicting the trajectory of targets, it helps to boost the precision and range of missiles. This module can be loaded with scripts to increase its effectiveness in certain areas.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.		 Description of item "Caldari Navy Missile Guidance Computer" (94063)

1043741 Republic Fleet Mining Survey Chipset Republic Fleet Mining Survey Chipset Name of item 94065 (Mining Survey Chipset)
1043742 An upgraded chipset for a mining vessel's integrated Mining Surveyor that grants superior asteroid information, and increases the chance of optimal mining outcomes.

Increases mining laser and ice harvester critical success chance and critical success bonus yield.
Decreases mining laser, ice harvester, and gas cloud harvester residue probability.
Enhances the integrated Mining Surveyor present in mining vessels by adding information about the quantity of ore remaining in scanned asteroids.		 An upgraded chipset for a mining vessel's integrated Mining Surveyor that grants superior asteroid information, and increases the chance of optimal mining outcomes.

Increases mining laser and ice harvester critical success chance and critical success bonus yield.
Decreases mining laser, ice harvester, and gas cloud harvester residue probability.
Enhances the integrated Mining Surveyor present in mining vessels by adding information about the quantity of ore remaining in scanned asteroids.		 Description of item "Republic Fleet Mining Survey Chipset" (94065)
1043745 Caldari Navy Signal Distortion Amplifier Caldari Navy Signal Distortion Amplifier Name of item 94067 (ECM Stabilizer)
1043746 Magnifies the operational ability of regular ECM target jammers, making them stronger and giving them greater reach. Works only with regular ECMs, not ECM Bursts.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.		 Magnifies the operational ability of regular ECM target jammers, making them stronger and giving them greater reach. Works only with regular ECMs, not ECM Bursts.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.		 Description of item "Caldari Navy Signal Distortion Amplifier" (94067)

1043902 Defending a complex can be done in any contested system, while capturing a complex must be done in a contested system that is less than 100% contested. 1043903 Zero - Unlimited Zero - Unlimited Name of item 94087 (Ship SKIN Design Element)
1043904 A license for the unlimited use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide Alignment Sequencer to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.		 A license for the unlimited use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide Alignment Sequencer to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.		 Description of item "Zero - Unlimited" (94087)
1043905 Zero - Limited Zero - Limited Name of item 94088 (Ship SKIN Design Element)
1043906 A license for the single use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has been bound, and though it can only be used once no sequence binders are required when it is consumed in the sequencing of a SKIN license.		 A license for the single use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has been bound, and though it can only be used once no sequence binders are required when it is consumed in the sequencing of a SKIN license.		 Description of item "Zero - Limited" (94088)

1043962 Industrial Reconfiguration Industrial Reconfiguration
1043963 This certificate represents a level of competence in handling Industrial Core modules. The holder has learned that Industrial Cores may only be used on Industrial Command Ships, improving their resource processing abilities at the expense of mobility and enabling the use of Compression Modules. This is a good skillset for capsuleers specializing in Industrial Command Ship hulls. This certificate represents a level of competence in handling Industrial Core modules. The holder has learned that Industrial Cores may only be used on Industrial Command Ships, improving their resource processing abilities at the expense of mobility and enabling the use of Compression Modules. This is a good skillset for capsuleers specializing in Industrial Command Ship hulls.

1043997 Subcapital Compression Subcapital Compression
1043998 This certificate represents a level of competence in handling both medium and large sized compression modules. The holder has learned that regular Asteroids, Ice, Gas, Mercoxit and Moon Ores can be compressed, and that Gas and Moon Ores can only be compressed using compression modules. The Fleet Compression Logistics skill can be trained to improve the distance that fleet members can reprocess from the ship. This is a good skillset for capsuleers specializing in Industrial Command Ship hulls. This certificate represents a level of competence in handling both medium and large sized compression modules. The holder has learned that regular Asteroids, Ice, Gas, Mercoxit and Moon Ores can be compressed, and that Gas and Moon Ores can only be compressed using compression modules. The Fleet Compression Logistics skill can be trained to improve the distance that fleet members can reprocess from the ship. This is a good skillset for capsuleers specializing in Industrial Command Ship hulls.
1043999 Capital Compression Capital Compression
1044000 This certificate represents a level of competence in handling capital sized compression modules. The holder has learned that regular Asteroids, Ice, Gas, Mercoxit and Moon Ores can be compressed, and that Gas and Moon Ores can only be compressed using compression modules. The Fleet Compression Logistics skill can be trained to improve the distance that fleet members can reprocess from the ship. This is a good skillset for capsuleers specializing in Capital Industrial Command Ship hulls. This certificate represents a level of competence in handling capital sized compression modules. The holder has learned that regular Asteroids, Ice, Gas, Mercoxit and Moon Ores can be compressed, and that Gas and Moon Ores can only be compressed using compression modules. The Fleet Compression Logistics skill can be trained to improve the distance that fleet members can reprocess from the ship. This is a good skillset for capsuleers specializing in Capital Industrial Command Ship hulls.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide Alignment Sequencer to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.		 Description of item "Cracked Corrosion - Unlimited" (94145)

1044087 As the Warpth Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire. As the Warpth Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. 1044096 The State Regulators are made up of the best pilots from all eight megacorporations' security forces. Assembled during the Warpath conflict by the CEP, their task is to defend megacorp assets from Gallente assault and safeguard the infrastructure that holds the State together. These Regulators are the ultimate combination of State loyalty and corporate honor. The State Regulators are made up of the best pilots from all eight megacorporations' security forces. Assembled during the Warpath conflict by the CEP, their task is to defend megacorp assets from Gallente assault and safeguard the infrastructure that holds the State together. These Regulators are the ultimate combination of State loyalty and corporate honor.

1044102 The smallest of the tribes by far, the Starkmanir are masters of ancient warfare strategies and battle wisdom all but lost by the other tribes. These strategies provide the basis for a Starkmanir Strategic wing, a small force of extremely effective Starkmanir pilots that came together in response to the Warpath Conflict. Famed for their ability to establish tactical superiority even against much larger enemy fleets, the Warpath Stark are often underestimated but never outclassed. The smallest of the tribes by far, the Starkmanir are masters of ancient warfare strategies and battle wisdom all but lost by the other tribes. These strategies provide the basis for a Starkmanir Strategic wing, a small force of extremely effective Starkmanir pilots that came together in response to the Warpath Conflict. Famed for their ability to establish tactical superiority even against much larger enemy fleets, the Warpath Stark are often underestimated but never outclassed.

1044111 Formed by Presidential decree during the first days of the Warpath Conflict, the Special Presidential Agents are a unique military unit of independently operating special agents given total autonomy over their actions. They answer directly to the president, and their primary mission directive is to disrupt the Caldari operations by any means necessary. Formed by Presidential decree during the first days of the Warpath Conflict, the Special Presidential Agents are a unique military unit of independently operating special agents given total autonomy over their actions. They answer directly to the president, and their primary mission directive is to disrupt the Caldari operations by any means necessary.

1044259 ENV_Lava_01a ENV_Lava_01a Name of item 94169 (Non-Interactable Object)
1044264 The power to impact New Eden has never been more evident than in the rise of Jita. It is through their actions that it has become the foremost trading hub in all of New Eden. It is the home of the legendary Jita 4-4, a unique station that is the beating heart of the cluster’s economy.

In YC128, amidst rising turmoil amongst its baseline population, the administration of the system was passed from the Caldari State to the CONCORD Assembly.		 The power to impact New Eden has never been more evident than in the rise of Jita. It is through their actions that it has become the foremost trading hub in all of New Eden. It is the home of the legendary Jita 4-4, a unique station that is the beating heart of the cluster’s economy.

In YC128, amidst rising turmoil amongst its baseline population, the administration of the system was passed from the Caldari State to the CONCORD Assembly.

1045521 Suspect Scout Navy Military Beacon Suspect Scout Navy Military Beacon Name of item 95173 (Beacon)
1045522 This beacon marks a scout military location. The entry gate is configured to admit Tech I and empire faction navy ships of Frigate size.

The security features installed in this acceleration gate will prevent activation by any ship that is fitted with warp core stabilizer modules. Additionally, it will provide all capsuleers with a suspect timer when they activate the acceleration gate.		 This beacon marks a scout military location. The entry gate is configured to admit Tech I and empire faction navy ships of Frigate size.

The security features installed in this acceleration gate will prevent activation by any ship that is fitted with warp core stabilizer modules. Additionally, it will provide all capsuleers with a suspect timer when they activate the acceleration gate.		 Description of item "Suspect Scout Navy Military Beacon" (95173)
1045523 Imperial Intelligence Exfil Imperial Intelligence Exfil
1045524 State Intelligence Exfil State Intelligence Exfil
1045525 Federal Intelligence Exfil Federal Intelligence Exfil
1045526 Republic Intelligence Exfil Republic Intelligence Exfil

1045634 Back Back UI/Campaigns/BackToCampaignSelection
1045645 Expires in {time_remaining} Expires in <b>{time_remaining}</b> UI/Achievements/Window/Card/TimeRemaining
1045646 Now you understand what we have lost and what we fight for still.

When you are ready to earn your honor, search out our campaigns or our militia offices.		 Now you understand what we have lost and what we fight for still.

When you are ready to earn your honor, search out our campaigns or our militia offices.
1045652 Much has changed since that day, but much has not. We are the Matari, and this is our Republic.

If you are ready to continue the fight for liberation, keep an eye out for our campaigns or find our militia offices.		 Much has changed since that day, but much has not. We are the Matari, and this is our Republic.

If you are ready to continue the fight for liberation, keep an eye out for our campaigns or find our militia offices.
1045653 You have borne witness to the true meaning of faith, the strength it grants, and the sacrifice it demands.

If you are ready to stand for our holy Empress, seek out our campaigns or enlist at one of our militia offices.		 You have borne witness to the true meaning of faith, the strength it grants, and the sacrifice it demands.

If you are ready to stand for our holy Empress, seek out our campaigns or enlist at one of our militia offices.
1045654 The fight for freedom is a never ending one.

Join our campaigns and serve justice, or enlist at one of our milita offices and fight the good fight.		 The fight for freedom is a never ending one.

Join our campaigns and serve justice, or enlist at one of our milita offices and fight the good fight.
1045655 I hope you are ready to extract yourself from that den of heretics.

I am Captain Marshal Sirdan xer Qosh, defender of the faith. Join me now in Amarr space, and we shall shine a light on whatever lies the Minmatar have told you.		 I hope you are ready to extract yourself from that den of heretics.

I am Captain Marshal Sirdan xer Qosh, defender of the faith. Join me now in Amarr space, and we shall shine a light on whatever lies the Minmatar have told you.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Travel - Undock"
1045656 Welcome to the constellation of Haven, home to the missionary work of the holy Amarr Empire within Exoridum.

Feel free to bask in the sacred glory of the Empire as you make your way to me.		 Welcome to the constellation of Haven, home to the missionary work of the holy Amarr Empire within Exoridum.

Feel free to bask in the sacred glory of the Empire as you make your way to me.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Travel - Faction Space"
1045657 I am Executive General Heika Torigo of the Caldari State.

AIR has alerted us that you are on your way. The State is happy to receive any honorable applicants		 I am Executive General Heika Torigo of the Caldari State.

AIR has alerted us that you are on your way. The State is happy to receive any honorable applicants		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Travel - Undock"
1045658 Welcome to Crucible, the Caldari Embassy constellation in Exordium.

I have no doubt that you will be suitably impressed by the honor and discipline our megacorporations have imposed here.		 Welcome to Crucible, the Caldari Embassy constellation in Exordium.

I have no doubt that you will be suitably impressed by the honor and discipline our megacorporations have imposed here.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Travel - Faction Space"
1045659 Capsuleer, this is Vice Admiral Foriana Revelli. We got word you are on your way over to Gallente space.

I’ll put some quafe on ice for you, see you soon.		 Capsuleer, this is Vice Admiral Foriana Revelli. We got word you are on your way over to Gallente space.

I’ll put some quafe on ice for you, see you soon.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Travel - Undock"
1045660 Welcome to the Federation Free-Zone, our little oasis of democracy here in Exordium.

Drop by when you’re ready, briefing room is all set up.		 Welcome to the Federation Free-Zone, our little oasis of democracy here in Exordium.

Drop by when you’re ready, briefing room is all set up.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Travel - Faction Space"
1045661 Greetings, Captain. I am Hetman General Kanth Filmir, the tribes of the Minmatar Republic are ready to receive you.

May your journey be swift and untroubled.		 Greetings, Captain. I am Hetman General Kanth Filmir, the tribes of the Minmatar Republic are ready to receive you.

May your journey be swift and untroubled.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Travel - Undock"
1045662 This is Strokar, a refuge for the clans of the Minmatar here within Exordium.

We are happy to extend the hospitality of our tribes during your visit, as long as you pay the Republic the respect it is due.		 This is Strokar, a refuge for the clans of the Minmatar here within Exordium.

We are happy to extend the hospitality of our tribes during your visit, as long as you pay the Republic the respect it is due.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Travel - Faction Space"
1045665 Captain, confirming your arrival at Caldari Prime orbital point gamma.

Pinging dispatch, let's get some clarity on the status of the megacorp transports near your position.		 Captain, confirming your arrival at Caldari Prime orbital point gamma.

Pinging dispatch, let's get some clarity on the status of the megacorp transports near your position.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Initial"
1045666 Receiving your transmission, Admiral.

Transports have suffered a warp malfunction en route to the main fleet. Repairs are underway.		 Receiving your transmission, Admiral.

Transports have suffered a warp malfunction en route to the main fleet. Repairs are underway.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Initial"
1045667 Hostiles on scan! Gallente en route to your position.

You need to protect those megacorp transports. Jam the invader’s sensors until the transports are able to escape.		 Hostiles on scan! Gallente en route to your position.

You need to protect those megacorp transports. Jam the invader’s sensors until the transports are able to escape.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Event - Rescue Civilains"
1045668 Protect as many as you can; every transport defended means thousands of innocents saved. Protect as many as you can; every transport defended means thousands of innocents saved. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Rescue Additional"
1045669 You have done your duty well, Captain. Let those Federation lap dogs choke on their frustration. You have done your duty well, Captain. Let those Federation lap dogs choke on their frustration. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Civilians Escaped - All"
1045670 The remaining transports are entering warp. They send you their deepest gratitude. The remaining transports are entering warp. They send you their deepest gratitude. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Civilians Escaped - Some"
1045671 Each Caldari saved is a victory, each loss an honored sacrifice. Each Caldari saved is a victory, each loss an honored sacrifice. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Civilians Escaped - Some"
1045672 All the transports have been destroyed; no signs of life detected. Our enemy is without honor or mercy. All the transports have been destroyed; no signs of life detected. Our enemy is without honor or mercy. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Civilians Escaped - None"
1045673 Return to the main fleet when ready. The time for our final departure is at hand. Return to the main fleet when ready. The time for our final departure is at hand. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Event - Enter Room 2 "
1045674 Welcome back to the fleet.

Departure is on hold while civilian ships resupply.		 Welcome back to the fleet.

Departure is on hold while civilian ships resupply.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Room 2 Intro"
1045675 Take a moment, enjoy the view. This may be your last chance. Take a moment, enjoy the view. This may be your last chance. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Room 2 Intro"
1045676 Traitors of Luminaire VII, bow to your rightful President. Traitors of Luminaire VII, bow to your rightful President. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - President Intro"
1045677 Of all the contemptuous powermongers to ever rule the Gallente, Luc Duvalier was the most despicable. Of all the contemptuous powermongers to ever rule the Gallente, Luc Duvalier was the most despicable. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - President Intro Narration"
1045678 I had thought after I bombed your planet into dust that you would give up this Caldari nonsense, but I see that your foolishness continues.

My mercy has reached its limit. Give up your ridiculous culture or die here and now.		 I had thought after I bombed your planet into dust that you would give up this Caldari nonsense, but I see that your foolishness continues.

My mercy has reached its limit. Give up your ridiculous culture or die here and now.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Gallente Attack"
1045679 Thanks to heroes like Admiral Tovil-Toba, whatever stars we orbit, whatever planets we call home, we remain Caldari. Thanks to heroes like Admiral Tovil-Toba, whatever stars we orbit, whatever planets we call home, we remain Caldari. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Complete 2"
1045680 You have surpassed my every expectation against one of the Caldari’s greatest challenges.

Join the state and do us the honor of fighting by your side.		 You have surpassed my every expectation against one of the Caldari’s greatest challenges.

Join the state and do us the honor of fighting by your side.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Complete 3 - Gold"
1045681 You have fought well for the State. fight alongside us, and you will only get stronger. You have fought well for the State. fight alongside us, and you will only get stronger. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Complete 3 - Silver"
1045682 You have seen just how hard our ancestors had to fight, and barely made it through.

Perhaps now you can appreciate the fortitude of the Caldari people.		 You have seen just how hard our ancestors had to fight, and barely made it through.

Perhaps now you can appreciate the fortitude of the Caldari people.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Complete 3 - Bronze"
1045683 No one… no one is replying. Are they all lost? No one… no one is replying. Are they all lost? Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Protect Civilians - None"
1045684 We still have transports alive out there, thanks to you, Captain.

I do not know how long they can hold on, though.		 We still have transports alive out there, thanks to you, Captain.

I do not know how long they can hold on, though.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Protect Civilians - Some"
1045685 I don’t know how, but our transports are reading green across the board. I don’t know how, but our transports are reading green across the board. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Protect Civilians - All"
1045686 Enemy reinforcements are arriving at regular intervals.

Focus on the survival of our people, not the death of theirs. That is your duty.		 Enemy reinforcements are arriving at regular intervals.

Focus on the survival of our people, not the death of theirs. That is your duty.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Protect Civilians 1"
1045687 Too stubborn to surrender, too stubborn to survive.

Your deaths will serve as a reminder to any others foolish enough to question the Federation.		 Too stubborn to surrender, too stubborn to survive.

Your deaths will serve as a reminder to any others foolish enough to question the Federation.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Protect Civilians 2"
1045688 Fleet strength dropping! Fleet strength dropping! Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Protect Civilians 3"
1045689 If this is going to be our last stand, let us make it with honor. If this is going to be our last stand, let us make it with honor. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Protect Civilians 4"
1045690 The Fedration will pay for this. The Fedration will pay for this. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Protect Civilians - None"
1045691 As long as the Caldari live, we will never be conquered. As long as the Caldari live, we will never be conquered. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Protect Civilians - Some"
1045692 The dream of New Caldari is a glorious one, if we can just survive today. The dream of New Caldari is a glorious one, if we can just survive today. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Protect Civilians - All"
1045693 Do not lose hope, I have a plan.

I am going to teach these Gallente what it feels like when your home is attacked.		 Do not lose hope, I have a plan.

I am going to teach these Gallente what it feels like when your home is attacked.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Sacrifice 1"
1045694 As all seemed lost, Admiral Yakiya Tovil-Toba prepared to make the ultimate sacrifice for all Caldari. As all seemed lost, Admiral Yakiya Tovil-Toba prepared to make the ultimate sacrifice for all Caldari. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Sacrifice 2"
1045695 Is that madman plotting a collision course for Gallente Prime? Forget those miscreants, go after him! Is that madman plotting a collision course for Gallente Prime? Forget those miscreants, go after him! Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Sacrifice 3"
1045696 As Admiral Tovil-Toba entered warp, the majority of the invading fleet chased after him. With most of the Gallente gone, our forces had one last chance at victory. As Admiral Tovil-Toba entered warp, the majority of the invading fleet chased after him. With most of the Gallente gone, our forces had one last chance at victory. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Sacrifice 4"
1045697 Gallente Prime is in sight. All hands abandon ship, that's an order.

I will be finishing this flight alone.		 Gallente Prime is in sight. All hands abandon ship, that's an order.

I will be finishing this flight alone.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Destroy Hostiles 1"
1045698 Breaching the upper atmosphere, now. It has been my greatest honor to serve. My only regret is that I won’t get to see you all make landfall.

Remember, we remain Caldari. No matter what.

[explosion sound]		 Breaching the upper atmosphere, now. It has been my greatest honor to serve. My only regret is that I won’t get to see you all make landfall.

Remember, we remain Caldari. No matter what.

[explosion sound]		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Destroy Hostiles 2"
1045699 We made it, just. Thank you, Admiral.

No time to mourn just yet, entering warp now. See you all on the other side.		 We made it, just. Thank you, Admiral.

No time to mourn just yet, entering warp now. See you all on the other side.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Destroy Hostiles - Slow"
1045700 Not bad out there, at least the Admiral’s death was not in vain.

No time to mourn just yet, entering warp now. See you all on the other side.		 Not bad out there, at least the Admiral’s death was not in vain.

No time to mourn just yet, entering warp now. See you all on the other side.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Destroy Hostiles - Normal"
1045701 Wow! You made quick work of those Federation bastards. The Admiral would be proud.

Entering Warp now. See you all on the other side.		 Wow! You made quick work of those Federation bastards. The Admiral would be proud.

Entering Warp now. See you all on the other side.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Dialog - Destroy Hostiles - Fast"
1045702 You have seen now the cost of freedom, and the struggle necessary to maintain it.

Join our fight against the Amarr, and continue the spirit of rebellion that founded our Republic.		 You have seen now the cost of freedom, and the struggle necessary to maintain it.

Join our fight against the Amarr, and continue the spirit of rebellion that founded our Republic.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Dialog - Complete - Bronze"
1045703 You have proved yourself and felt what it means to fight side by side with the Matari.

Join our fight against the Amarr, and continue the spirit of rebellion that founded our Republic.		 You have proved yourself and felt what it means to fight side by side with the Matari.

Join our fight against the Amarr, and continue the spirit of rebellion that founded our Republic.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Dialog - Complete - Silver"
1045704 An elite pilot like yourself is just the kind of champion the Tribes of Matar need.

Join our fight against the Amarr, and continue the spirit of rebellion that founded our Republic.		 An elite pilot like yourself is just the kind of champion the Tribes of Matar need.

Join our fight against the Amarr, and continue the spirit of rebellion that founded our Republic.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Dialog - Complete - Gold"
1045705 You have borne witness to the trials that face the faithful. Fight by our side, and you shall see how, with faith, you can rise above them. You have borne witness to the trials that face the faithful. Fight by our side, and you shall see how, with faith, you can rise above them. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Dialog - Complete - Bronze"
1045706 You have proven yourself, passing through the slings and arrows of the heretics to deliver victory at any cost.

Now join us here beyond the bounds of simulation and join the glory of the chosen.		 You have proven yourself, passing through the slings and arrows of the heretics to deliver victory at any cost.

Now join us here beyond the bounds of simulation and join the glory of the chosen.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Dialog - Complete - Silver"
1045707 The Lord has clearly blessed you with great skill. Fly beneath the Lord’s banner, and that skill shall earn you the glory of the chosen. The Lord has clearly blessed you with great skill. Fly beneath the Lord’s banner, and that skill shall earn you the glory of the chosen. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Dialog - Complete - Gold"
1045708 Now you know just how hard we fight, and that it’s a fight worth winning. Come join the Federation, and see justice done right. Now you know just how hard we fight, and that it’s a fight worth winning. Come join the Federation, and see justice done right. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Complete - Bronze"
1045709 You did well. Care to take those skills into the real world, into a fight that really matters? Come join the Federation, and see justice done right. You did well. Care to take those skills into the real world, into a fight that really matters? Come join the Federation, and see justice done right. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Complete - Silver"
1045710 The Federation would be proud to have a pilot like you flying with us. Put those skills to good use in the only fight that really matters, the fight for freedom. The Federation would be proud to have a pilot like you flying with us. Put those skills to good use in the only fight that really matters, the fight for freedom. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Complete - Gold"
1045712 Great work, that should be enough to show these heretics a thing or two.

Follow me, Captain, we’re heading into the belly of this rebellious beast.		 Great work, that should be enough to show these heretics a thing or two.

Follow me, Captain, we’re heading into the belly of this rebellious beast.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Dialog - Dreadnought Repaired - Average"
1045713 That will have to do. Ready or not, the time to strike is now!

Follow me, Captain, we’re heading into the belly of this rebellious beast.		 That will have to do. Ready or not, the time to strike is now!

Follow me, Captain, we’re heading into the belly of this rebellious beast.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Dialog - Dreadnought Repaired - Poor"
1045715 Finally, that is the last of them.

We’ve cleared out this wing, searching for our next target.		 Finally, that is the last of them.

We’ve cleared out this wing, searching for our next target.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Dialog - Hostiles Destroyed - Slow"
1045716 Nicely done, that’s the last of them.

We’ve cleared out this wing, searching for our next target.		 Nicely done, that’s the last of them.

We’ve cleared out this wing, searching for our next target.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Dialog - Hostiles Destroyed - Average"
1045722 A ship carrying Caldari civilians and the assets of Caldari megacorporations as they attempt to escape the attacks on their home planet. A ship carrying Caldari civilians and the assets of Caldari megacorporations as they attempt to escape the attacks on their home planet. Description of item "Megacorp Transport" (93937)
1045723 Once loaded full of valuable Intaki artifacts, this Badger-class hauler plans to steal them for its megacorp masters. Once loaded full of valuable Intaki artifacts, this Badger-class hauler plans to steal them for its megacorp masters. Description of item "Plundering Hauler" (93938)
1045724 No! All is lost! What will I tell my corporate overseer! No! All is lost! What will I tell my corporate overseer! Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Destroy Haulers - All"
1045725 We may have lost the day, but with this Intaki wealth, our investment has paid off. We may have lost the day, but with this Intaki wealth, our investment has paid off. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Destroy Haulers - None"
1045726 Unacceptable! Barely a pittance. The CEOs are not going to be happy. Unacceptable! Barely a pittance. The CEOs are not going to be happy. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Destroy Haulers - Some"
1045727 You tell them the Federation says to stay away from our freedom! You tell them the Federation says to stay away from our freedom! Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Destroy Haulers - All"
1045728 You tell them the Federation says next time we come for them! You tell them the Federation says next time we come for them! Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Destroy Haulers - Some"
1045729 It’s the people that matter; these Caldari wouldn't understand that. It’s the people that matter; these Caldari wouldn't understand that. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Destroy Haulers - None"
1045731 The titan has landed, barely a scratch on it, thanks to you! The titan has landed, barely a scratch on it, thanks to you! Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Defend Titan - Good"
1045732 The titan has landed! Thanks to you, it's fighting fit and ready to roll! The titan has landed! Thanks to you, it's fighting fit and ready to roll! Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Defend Titan - Average"
1045733 The titan has landed, worse for wear but still ready to fight! The titan has landed, worse for wear but still ready to fight! Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Defend Titan - Poor"
1045734 Finally, that’s the last of their guard dogs. Get ready for liberation phase 2. Finally, that’s the last of their guard dogs. Get ready for liberation phase 2. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Destroy Hostiles - Slow"
1045735 Nicely done, Captain. That’s the last of their guard dogs. Get ready for liberation phase 2. Nicely done, Captain. That’s the last of their guard dogs. Get ready for liberation phase 2. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Destroy Hostiles - Average"
1045736 Whoa, you made short work of those Caldari guard dogs. Get ready, liberation phase 2 is about to begin. Whoa, you made short work of those Caldari guard dogs. Get ready, liberation phase 2 is about to begin. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Gallente - Dialog - Destroy Hostiles - Fast"
1045737 Just one will be enough to turn the tide. Self-destruct initiated.

Wrap your arms around the enemy
For faith is your fire
And with it, burn away his evil		 Just one will be enough to turn the tide. Self-destruct initiated.

<i>Wrap your arms around the enemy
For faith is your fire
And with it, burn away his evil</i>		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Dialog - Neut Flagship - Slow"
1045738 You have been weakened, now face the Lord’s judgement with me! Self-destruct initiated.

Wrap your arms around the enemy
For faith is your fire
And with it, burn away his evil		 You have been weakened, now face the Lord’s judgement with me! Self-destruct initiated.

<i>Wrap your arms around the enemy
For faith is your fire
And with it, burn away his evil</i>		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Dialog - Neut Flagship - Average"
1045739 You all shall be laid low before the judgment of the Lord! Self-destruct initiated

Wrap your arms around the enemy
For faith is your fire
And with it, burn away his evil		 You all shall be laid low before the judgment of the Lord! Self-destruct initiated

<i>Wrap your arms around the enemy
For faith is your fire
And with it, burn away his evil</i>		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Amarr - Dialog - Neut Flagship - Fast"
1045766 Fleet Commander Xavier Pard Fleet Commander Xavier Pard
1045767 Fleet Commander Xavier Pard Fleet Commander Xavier Pard
1045768 Fleet Commander Xavier Pard Fleet Commander Xavier Pard
1045769 Commander Xavier Pard Commander Xavier Pard
1045770 Matar General Ronit Joranth Matar General Ronit Joranth
1045771 Matar General Ronit Joranth Matar General Ronit Joranth
1045772 Fleet Commander Xavier Pard Fleet Commander Xavier Pard
1045773 Matar, in the system of Pator. For centuries, these Amarrian guns have been pointed at the population below. In their arrogance, they never expected we would break our own chains and build our own fleet. Matar, in the system of Pator. For centuries, these Amarrian guns have been pointed at the population below. In their arrogance, they never expected we would break our own chains and build our own fleet. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Dialog - Hack Defences 1"
1045774 Global forces are occupying key positions and ready to engage on your mark.

We need those defenses disabled before go time, or they’ll kill every one of us.		 Global forces are occupying key positions and ready to engage on your mark.

We need those defenses disabled before go time, or they’ll kill every one of us.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Dialog - Hack Defences 2"
1045775 Move fast; all three turrets must be disabled simultaneously or they’ll keep coming back online. Move fast; all three turrets must be disabled simultaneously or they’ll keep coming back online. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Event - Hack Defences - Hack 1"
1045776 Nice work, keep it up. Just one more to go.

Ground commander, are you ready to move on our mark?		 Nice work, keep it up. Just one more to go.

Ground commander, are you ready to move on our mark?		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Event - Hack Defences - Hack 2"
1045777 We’ve got Mass Drivers and khumaak’s ready to unleash hell on these Imperial soldiers as soon as those defences are down. We’ve got Mass Drivers and khumaak’s ready to unleash hell on these Imperial soldiers as soon as those defences are down. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Dialog - Hack Defences - Hack 2.1"
1045778 Just in time, operational window is about to close. Entering Warp now. Just in time, operational window is about to close. Entering Warp now. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Dialog - Hack Defences - Hack 3 - Slow"
1045779 Nicely done, the turrets are down, and our fleet is warping in.

Those Imperial bastards won’t know what hit them.		 Nicely done, the turrets are down, and our fleet is warping in.

Those Imperial bastards won’t know what hit them.		 Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Dialog - Hack Defences - Hack 3 - Normal"
1045780 Expertly done, Captain. That was so fast, there’s no way they will see us coming. Expertly done, Captain. That was so fast, there’s no way they will see us coming. Part of conversation "AIR Epic Arc - Minmatar - Dialog - Hack Defences - Hack 3 - Fast"
1045781 Fleet Commander Xavier Pard Fleet Commander Xavier Pard

1045796 Collect rewards on each of the first 20 unique days you log in. Collect rewards on each of the first 20 unique days you log in.

1045798 This Expert System unlocks foundational ship operation skills for 7 days This Expert System unlocks foundational ship operation skills for 7 days
1045799 Skill Points can be instantly applied to advance training progress for any skill. Skill Points can be instantly applied to advance training progress for any skill.
1045800 This booster will improve your racial ship attributes for 2 hours. This booster will improve your racial ship attributes for 2 hours.
1045801 This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly an exploration Frigate fitted with basic travel, scanning and hacking equipment for 7 days This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly an exploration Frigate fitted with basic travel, scanning and hacking equipment for 7 days
1045802 The crate contains a racial scanning frigate, fitted and insured. The crate contains a racial scanning frigate, fitted and insured.
1045803 This booster will speed up your character's skill training for 48 hours. This booster will speed up your character's skill training for 48 hours.
1045804 Skill Points can be instantly applied to advance training progress for any skill. Skill Points can be instantly applied to advance training progress for any skill.
1045805 This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly various T1 Destroyers for 7 days.. This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly various T1 Destroyers for 7 days..
1045806 The crate contains a racial T1 fitted Destroyers with insurance. The crate contains a racial T1 fitted Destroyers with insurance.
1045807 This sealed containment crate holds a Calm Abyssal Filament of a random weather type that can transport you to an Abyssal Deadspace pocket. This sealed containment crate holds a Calm Abyssal Filament of a random weather type that can transport you to an Abyssal Deadspace pocket.
1045808 Skill Points can be instantly applied to advance training progress for any skill. Skill Points can be instantly applied to advance training progress for any skill.
1045809 This Expert System makes available skills enabling the Capsuleer to fly a Mining Destroyer, such as a Pioneer for 7 days. This Expert System makes available skills enabling the Capsuleer to fly a Mining Destroyer, such as a Pioneer for 7 days.
1045810 The crate contains a fitted Pioneer mining destroyer with insurance. The crate contains a fitted Pioneer mining destroyer with insurance.
1045811 This booster will speed up your character's skill training for 96 hours. This booster will speed up your character's skill training for 96 hours.
1045812 Skill Points can be instantly applied to advance training progress for any skill. Skill Points can be instantly applied to advance training progress for any skill.
1045813 This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly various T1 Cruisers. This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly various T1 Cruisers.
1045814 The crate contains a racial T1 fitted Cruisers with insurance. The crate contains a racial T1 fitted Cruisers with insurance.
1045815 This certificate allows you a single resculpt of your pilot's facial features and body shape. Once you activate the certificate it will be consumed immediately, and the next time you enter pilot customization you can make use of the full resculpt. This certificate allows you a single resculpt of your pilot's facial features and body shape. Once you activate the certificate it will be consumed immediately, and the next time you enter pilot customization you can make use of the full resculpt.
1045816 This booster will improve your racial ship attributes for 2 hours. This booster will improve your racial ship attributes for 2 hours.
1045817 Skill Points can be instantly applied to advance training progress for any skill. Skill Points can be instantly applied to advance training progress for any skill.

1045825 Can't enter Exordium with PVP flags Can't enter Exordium with PVP flags UI/Messages/CantEnterExordiumWithPvPFlag
1045826 Starter Space rules prevent this action Starter Space rules prevent this action UI/Messages/StarterSpaceAggressionBlocked
1045831 Pioneer Starter Crate Pioneer Starter Crate Name of item 95191 (Special Edition Commodities)
1045832 This item cannot be traded or sold on the market. This item cannot be traded or sold on the market. Description of item "Pioneer Starter Crate" (95191)
1045833 Pioneer Starter Crate Pioneer Starter Crate
1045835 Pioneer Ship Fitting Pioneer Ship Fitting
1045836 Pioneer Pioneer Name of item 95192 (Standard Expert Systems)
1045837 <font size="14">Pioneer Expert System</font>

This Expert System makes available skills enabling the Capsuleer to fly a Mining Destroyer, such as a Pioneer.

The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for 7 days.

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14">Activating an Expert System</font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.		 <font size="14"><b>Pioneer Expert System</b></font>

This Expert System makes available skills enabling the Capsuleer to fly a Mining Destroyer, such as a Pioneer.

<b>The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for 7 days.</b>

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14"><b>Activating an Expert System</b></font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

<i>Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.</i>		 Description of item "Pioneer" (95192)
